title: Department Manager
description:
**ZARA** 




 Avdelningschef- ZARA Stockholm
 



  





*Våra avdelningschefer är självmedvetna ledare som arbetar för en inkluderande arbetsmiljö. De leder avdelningen i det dagliga arbetet samtidigt som de balanserar företagets strategiska mål.* 












**Om oss** 




**Zara** 
 erbjuder de senaste trenderna inom mode. Vi är ett internationellt varumärke med butiker världen över samt online. Vår affärsmodell är kundcentrerad och vi anpassar oss ständigt efter våra kunders behov. Vi älskar det vi gör. Teamwork, passion, nyfikenhet, mångfald, hållbarhet, kreativitet och ödmjukhet är våra dagliga drivkrafter. Känner du igen dig? Kanske är du en Zara-person.
 







**Din profil** 




 Du har en passion för mode och god kännedom om marknaden, konkurrenter och trender. Du har god kunskap om företaget, varumärket och butiken. Du har erfarenhet av att leda team och har arbetat inom fast fashion-branschen.
 



 Du är passionerad, nyfiken, motiverad och dynamisk, med något unikt att bidra med. Du är noggrann, kreativ och proaktiv och söker en utmanande men givande karriär inom inredning och butikskoncept. Du har förmågan att hantera flera arbetsuppgifter samtidigt och prioritera mellan dina huvudsakliga ansvarsområden.
 







**Det här söker vi hos dig** 




 Du nsvarar för att leda butiken och teamet i samarbete med Store Manager. Målet är att maximera försäljningen och skapa stark kundlojalitet. Rollen är helt fokuserad på att nå uppsatta försäljningsmål, med särskilt fokus på produktstyrning och operativa arbetsuppgifter.
 















**Några av dina huvudsakliga ansvarsområden är:** 



* Ansvara för teamet: rekrytering, hantering av frånvaro, feedback, konflikthantering och motivation.
* Säkerställa daglig och effektiv kommunikation med säljteamet och produktansvarig.
* Följa upp introduktions- och utbildningsplaner för nyanställda samt arbeta med teamutveckling, succession planning i butiken och prestation.
* Säkerställa att Visual Merchandising speglar aktuella trender och lyfter fram bästsäljande produkter.
* Ha ett starkt fokus på Customer Experience och säkerställa att teamet alltid levererar en hög nivå av kundservice.
* Ta över Store Managers ansvar vid dennes frånvaro.







**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 Vår interna talang är vår största tillgång och vi är stolta över att erbjuda interna karriärmöjligheter där du får chans att utvecklas. Vi erbjuder e-learning och utbildningsprogram – vi slutar aldrig lära oss!
 



 Du erbjuds ett konkurrenskraftigt ersättningspaket samt 25 % personalrabatt på de senaste trenderna inom alla våra Inditex-varumärken som finns på din marknad.
 



 Vi är engagerade i att säkerställa att våra rekryteringsprocesser är tillgängliga och inkluderande för alla. Det innebär bland annat att vi gör anpassningar för personer med funktionsvariationer eller långvariga hälsotillstånd.
 



  





 Om du är intresserad av tjänsten och anser att du matchar den profil vi söker, är du varmt välkommen att ansöka.
 



  





**ZARA** 




 Department Manager- Zara Stockholm
 



  





*Our department manager are self-aware leaders that are working for an inclusive environment. They are managing the department on a day to day basis whilst balancing strategic goals of the Company.* 




**About us** 




 Zara offers the latest trends within fashion. An international brand with stores in the main cities of the world and online. Our business model is centered on our customers, constantly adapting to their needs. We love what we do. Teamwork, passion, curiosity, diversity, sustainability, creativity, and humbleness are our daily motivations. Does it sound like you? Maybe you are a Zara person.
 







**How we imagine you** 














 A passion for fashion and knowledge of the market, competitors and trends. Good knowledge of the company, the brand and the store. Team management experience. Has experience working for fast fashion companies. You are passionate, curious, motivated, and dynamic, with something different to contribute. You are detail-oriented, creative, and proactive and are looking for a challenging yet rewarding career in Interior design. You can multitask between your key responsibilities.
 



  





**What we expect from you** 














 Manages the store and the team in coordination with the Store Manager. Their goal is to maximise sales and build customer loyalty. Is completely oriented towards achieving sales objectives, focusing on product management and operational functions.
 



  





  





 Some of your main responsibilities will be:
 



  




* Manages people: recruitment, absenteeism, feedback, conflict resolution, motivation.
* Has a daily effective communication with the sales team and the product manager.
* Is in charge of following up on the training plan for new hires and manages team development, store succession planning and performance.
* Makes sure that Visual Merchandising reflects current trends and enhances best sellers.
* Is completely Customer Experience focused, ensuring that the team is trained to always maintain a high standard in Customer Service.
* Performs the rest of the store manager's functions in their absence.



  





  





**What we offer:** 




  





 Our internal talent is our greatest asset and we are proud of offering internal promotion programs where you will find opportunities to grow, e-learning and training programs - we never stop learning!
 



 You will be rewarded with a competitive compensation package and you will also receive 25% discount to buy the latest trends in any of our Inditex brands available in your market.
 



 We are committed to ensure that our recruitment processes are barrier free and as inclusive as possible to everyone. This includes making adjustments for people with disability or long-term conditions.
 



 If you are interested in this position and believe that you match the required profile, please apply.
 



*Looking forward to you application!*

title: Junior IT Project Manager
description:
**Junior IT Project Manager** 




  





**About the Role** 




  





 We are seeking a motivated
 **Junior Project Manager** 
 to support the successful delivery of IT projects across a range of technology initiatives. This role is responsible for coordinating project activities, managing stakeholder communication, tracking budgets and timelines, and ensuring project objectives are delivered within scope, quality, and cost expectations.
 



 The successful candidate will work independently while collaborating closely with technical teams, business stakeholders, and third-party suppliers where required.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  




* Support the planning, execution, monitoring, and closure of IT projects.
* Manage project scope, timelines, budgets, risks, and deliverables.
* Coordinate project resources and stakeholder requirements.
* Maintain project plans, status reports, and governance documentation.
* Facilitate Agile ceremonies and Scrum activities.
* Work with internal teams and external vendors to ensure successful project delivery.
* Monitor project progress and proactively address issues and risks.
* Ensure projects meet agreed quality standards and business objectives.



  





**Essential Skills & Experience** 




  




* **3 - 4 years of experience** 
 in Project Management, Project Coordination, or a related IT delivery role.
* Experience working within
 **Agile/Scrum environments** 
 .
* Scrum Master experience or involvement in facilitating Agile ceremonies.
* Basic understanding of IT technologies and software delivery projects.
* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills.
* Experience managing project plans, schedules, and project documentation.
* Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities.

title: Visual Merchandiser
description:
**ZARA** 




**Visual Merchanidser- Zara Stockholm** 




  





*Våra Commercials arbetar aktivt för att maximera försäljningen genom analys och ansvarar för avdelningens visuella uttryck och helhetsimage. Du har ett starkt intresse för design och ett öga för detaljer.* 




  





**Om oss** 




**Zara** 
 erbjuder de senaste modetrenderna för dam, herr och barn. Vi är ett internationellt varumärke med butiker världen över samt online. Vår affärsmodell är kundcentrerad och vi anpassar oss ständigt efter våra kunders behov. Vi älskar det vi gör. Teamwork, passion, nyfikenhet, mångfald, hållbarhet, kreativitet och ödmjukhet är våra dagliga drivkrafter. Känner du igen dig? Kanske är du en Zara-person.
 



  





**Din profil** 




 Du är passionerad, nyfiken, motiverad och dynamisk, med något unikt att bidra med. Du är noggrann, kreativ och proaktiv och söker en utmanande men givande karriär inom mode. Du har förmågan att hantera flera arbetsuppgifter samtidigt och prioritera mellan dina huvudsakliga ansvarsområden.
 



 Du älskar mode och värdesätter personligt uttryck. Du har mycket god analytisk förmåga samt är skicklig på att prioritera och organisera ditt arbete. Hos Inditex hittar du mer än bara ett jobb.
 



  





**Det här söker vi hos dig** 




 Som Commercial ansvarar du för butikens visuella uttryck och layout. Du säkerställer att de senaste trenderna och bästsäljarna presenteras enligt företagets riktlinjer, med en balans mellan kommersiellt fokus och varumärkets image.
 



  





**Några av dina huvudsakliga ansvarsområden:** 



* Följa upp den dagliga varupåfyllnaden och säkerställa en hög visuell standard i butiken
* Analysera försäljningsstatistik för att lyfta fram rätt produkter
* Genomföra konkurrentanalyser och ge produktfeedback
* Motivera, uppmuntra, utveckla och inspirera ditt team



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 Vår interna talang är vår största tillgång och vi är stolta över att erbjuda interna karriärmöjligheter där du får chans att utvecklas. Vi erbjuder e-learning och utbildningsprogram – vi slutar aldrig lära oss!
 



 Du erbjuds ett konkurrenskraftigt ersättningspaket samt 25 % personalrabatt på de senaste trenderna inom alla våra Inditex-varumärken som finns på din marknad.
 



 Vi är engagerade i att säkerställa att våra rekryteringsprocesser är tillgängliga och inkluderande för alla. Det innebär bland annat att vi gör anpassningar för personer med funktionsvariationer eller långvariga hälsotillstånd.
 



  





 Om du är intresserad av tjänsten och anser att du matchar den profil vi söker, är du varmt välkommen att ansöka.
 



  





**ZARA** 




**Vissual Merchandiser – Zara Stockholm** 




  





*Our commercials maximizing sales through effective analysis and are responsible for the image of the section. Have an excessive interest for design and details.* 




  





**About us** 




 Zara offers the latest fashion trends for women, men and children. An international brand with stores in the main cities of the world and online. Our business model is centred in our customers, constantly adapting to their needs. We love what we do. Teamwork, passion, curiosity, diversity, sustainability, creativity and humility are our daily motivation. Does it sound like you? Maybe you are a Zara person.
 



  





**How we imagine you** 




 You are passionate, curious, motivated and dynamic, with something different to contribute. You are detail-oriented, creative and proactive and are looking for a challenging yet rewarding career in fashion. You are able to multitask between your key responsibilities. You love fashion and celebrate self-expression. You have excellent analysis, prioritization and organizational skills. At Inditex you will find more than a job.
 



  





**What we expect from you** 




 As a Commercial, you are responsible for the image and layout of your store, making sure the latest trends and best sellers are represented according to the company specifications, balancing between commerciality and image. Some of your main responsibilities will be:
 


* Monitoring daily product replenishment and maintaining a high level of image standards
* Analyzing sales rankings to promote the correct merchandise
* Competitor analysis and product feedback
* Motivate, encourage, develop and inspire your team



  





**What we offer** 




 Our internal talent is our greatest asset and we are proud of offering internal promotion programs where you will find opportunities to grow, e-learning and training programs - we never stop learning!
 



 You will be rewarded with a competitive compensation package and you will also receive 25% discount to buy the latest trends in any of our Inditex brands available in your market.
 



 We are committed to ensure that our recruitment processes are barrier free and as inclusive as possible to everyone. This includes making adjustments for people with disability or long-term conditions.
 



  





 If you are interested in this position and believe that you match the required profile, please apply.

title: Enterprise Account Director – Talent Solutions (Staffing)
description:
LinkedIn is the world’s largest professional network, built to create economic opportunity for every member of the global workforce. Our products help people make powerful connections, discover exciting opportunities, build necessary skills, and gain valuable insights every day. We’re also committed to providing transformational opportunities for our own employees by investing in their growth. We aspire to create a culture that’s built on trust, care, inclusion, and fun – where everyone can succeed.
   

  





 Join us to transform the way the world works.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 This role will be based in Stockholm.
   

  





 At LinkedIn, our approach to flexible work is centered on trust and optimized for culture, connection, clarity, and the evolving needs of our business.
 *The work location of this role is hybrid, meaning it will be performed both from home and from a LinkedIn office on select days, as determined by the business needs of the team.*




 We are looking for a Large Enterprise Account Director to join our team as a trusted adviser with a relentless focus on bringing value to our customers within the Enterprise sector. You will be responsible for helping our customers effectively engage with our solutions (Talent & Learning). You will be dedicated to making our customers stronger and seeking out opportunities for growth. Although you possess a strategic approach to selling and strive to meet/exceed revenue goals, you will always have your clients’ best interest in mind and act as their internal advocate to ensure they are set up for success.
   

  





**Responsibilities:**



* Researches Customer’s business and prepares thoughtful questions and insights in advance of customer meetings
* Asks layered, open-ended questions to understand and clarify Customer’s objectives and challenges beyond surface-level detail
* Builds relationships with multiple stakeholders (vertically and horizontally) across the Customer’s organization
* Shifts communication style and content to fit the needs of different stakeholders
* Leads with Solutions, not products, when making recommendations aligned to Customer objectives
* Sells with Integrity
* Drives customer decision making by achieving shared vision and proactively considering the value props that tie all stakeholders together
* Thinks commercially and applies business acumen when crafting & negotiating commercial agreements
* Uses data and insights to support investment recommendations or overcome customer objections
* Proactively mitigates churn risk by adopting a smart, customer-centric approach
* Engages customers throughout to confirm and clarify value and adapts a strategy when needed to optimize ROI
* Drives Customer growth by proactively identifying opportunities to deliver greater customer value
* Applies business acumen in Account Planning by considering economic, industry, and company factors with a Customer-centric lens.
* Maps all key stakeholders in an account to assess the strength of the account relationship and create account outreach strategy
* Agrees to joint accountability with colleagues and cross-functional teams for optimal customer success
* Practices humility and asks for help from colleagues when faced with a challenge or unknown
* Is disciplined in Territory and Account Planning, Forecasting, and Quota Attainment
* Follows best practices when using CRM and other Sales tools in order to manage the Sales and Buyer cycles


**Qualifications**

**Basic Qualifications:** 
  

  




* 6+ years client relationship management experience in a B2B consultative solution sales role managing large clients
* Experience managing dealing with C-Suite/Executive-level stakeholders when closing large deals for Enterprise customers



**Preferred Qualifications** 
 :
   

  




* Business Fluency in either Swedish, Norwegian, Danish or Finnish
* Experience selling to staffing organisations
* Experience with HR software
* Experience with SaaS opportunities and modern CRM system
* Experience selling IT solutions
* Knowledge of software contract terms and conditions with the ability to create fair transactions
* Strong negotiation and accurate forecasting skills
* Experience carrying a revenue target with the ability to develop compelling strategies that deliver results
* Excellent communication, negotiation and forecasting skills
* Demonstrated ability to find and manage high-level business in an evangelistic sales environment
* Ability to gather and use data to inform decision making and persuade others
* Ability to assess business opportunities and read prospective buyers
* Ability to orchestrate the closure of business with an accurate understanding of prospect needs
* Ability to include multiple partners and members of the company management team using competitive selling to position company products against direct and indirect competitors



**Suggested skills:**



* Prospecting
* Forecasting
* Relationship building
* Multithreading


**Additional Information**

**Global Data Privacy Notice and Compliance Posters for Job Candidates**




 Please use this link to access documents that provide information about how LinkedIn handles the personal data of employees and job applicants, as well as the E-Verify Participation Notice and the Department of Justice Immigrant and Employee Rights Section Right to Work posters: https://www.linkedin.com/legal/candidate-portal.

title: Business IT Analyst
description:
**About Justera Group**
 Justera Group is a leading Swedish IT consulting company specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. We help organizations accelerate their digital transformation through expert consultancy, software development, and talent solutions. Our consultants work on impactful projects across industries, helping clients achieve sustainable business success through innovation and technology.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are currently looking for a Senior Business IT Analyst to join an exciting assignment with one of Sweden's leading automotive companies in Södertälje.
   

  

 In this role, you will be responsible for identifying and analyzing information used across business processes and applications, translating business needs into clear requirements, and supporting implementation initiatives. You will work closely with stakeholders across multiple functions and global teams to ensure business and technical requirements are aligned and effectively delivered.
   

  

 The assignment also includes aspects of data privacy and information governance, making it ideal for candidates with experience in regulatory and compliance-related initiatives.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Analyze business processes, information flows, and application usage
* Gather, document, and manage business and system requirements
* Collaborate with internal and external stakeholders to define solutions
* Support implementation and continuous improvement initiatives
* Ensure alignment between business needs and IT solutions
* Contribute to data privacy and information governance activities
* Work closely with global cross-functional teams within the organization


**Required Qualifications**
* Academic degree in a relevant field
* Extensive experience as a Business IT Analyst or similar role
* Experience working within automotive projects
* Previous experience working with our automotive client in Södertälje
* Strong analytical and stakeholder management skills
* Excellent communication and documentation abilities


**Meritorious Qualifications**
* Experience within information governance, including legal, architecture, or information security perspectives
* Experience working with Data Privacy initiatives
* Knowledge of vehicle electrical systems and/or embedded systems
* C/CE driver's license
* Experience working in global and cross-functional environments


**What We Offer**
* A dynamic and innovative workplace
* Opportunities to work on impactful projects with leading industry clients
* Collaboration with talented and experienced professionals
* Competitive compensation and benefits package
* Continuous learning and professional development opportunities
* Flexible hybrid working model supporting work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave
* Annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK


 If you are a driven and experienced Business IT Analyst with a passion for the automotive industry, we would love to hear from you.

title: Tjänsteledare av IT-tjänster
description:
**Vill du leda kvalificerad tjänsteutveckling i en strategisk viktig funktion?**




 Är du senior, nyfiken på Region Stockholms verksamheter och driven av att forma tjänster som gör skillnad för vårdens och kollektivtrafikens medarbetare? Då kan rollen som tjänsteledare hos oss vara din nästa.
   

  





 Avdelningen för tjänsteplanering söker nu 1-3 nyckelpersoner som trivs i stora komplex verksamheter, har förmågan att se helhet och omvandla komplexa behov till konkreta strategier och lösningar. Hos oss får du en central roll med möjlighet att utforma IT-tjänster som dagligen används av Region Stockholms ca 50 000 medarbetare.
   

  





****Om oss****




 Serviceförvaltningen i Region Stockholm ansvarar för att utveckla och modernisera effektiva administrativa stödtjänster åt regionens kärnverksamheter så att det kan göra sitt bästa för patienter, resenärer, invånare och besökare. Vi är cirka 700 medarbetare som arbetar med slutanvändartjänster, nätverk, drift, kapacitet och administrativa stödsystem, handläggning och inköp.
   

  





****Om tjänsten****




 I rollen som tjänsteledare arbetar du verksamhetsnära och strategiskt för att säkerställa att tjänsteutbudet möter kärnverksamheternas behov – både idag och över tid. Du håller ihop ett eller flera tjänsteområden genom hela dess livscykel – från kunddialog, innehåll, kostnad till uppföljning och utveckling.
   

  





 Serviceförvaltningens tjänster ska tjäna många användare med olika behov, vara realistisk att producera, och hålla ihop ekonomiskt över tid. Att hitta den specifikation som tjänar alla dessa krav samtidigt är inte ett påbud du levererar – det är resultatet av en process som du driver, men där andras kompetens är förutsättningen för att den ska lyckas, rollen är tjänstens nav.
   

  





 Dina huvudsakliga uppgifter innebär att:
 


* Leda strategiska dialoger med kärnverksamheternas företrädare och de ansvariga för tjänsteleveransen. Du lyssnar in, översätter till tjänstetermer, väger samman den komplexa bilden och lägger förslag till möjliga gemensamma lösningar.
* Du driver utredning och beredning genom att ta fram väl avvägda beslutsunderlag utifrån ett helhetsperspektiv sett till kärnverksamheternas behov, Regionfullmäktiges mål, legala krav, med mera så att beslut kan fattas av rätt instans på rätt grund.
* Du följer tjänstens leverans, ekonomi och kundnöjdhet – i nära dialog med tjänstelevererande enheter som har den dagliga insikten – och omsätter signalerna till rekommendationer om framtida vägval, ofta i ett tidsperspektiv som sträcker sig fem till tio år.
* Du har god insikt i hur tjänsten produceras och levereras som helhet och kan agera länk mellan de olika parterna i kedjan och med användande verksamheter.
* Du samarbetar tätt med kollegorna inom tjänsteplanering för att säkerställa att tjänsteutbudet är samordnat och för att utveckla effektiva gemensamma arbetssätt, processer och rutiner för hur arbetet med tjänsteutbudet ska bedrivas.



****Vem är du?****




 Vi söker dig med senior erfarenhet från tjänste-, produkt- eller portföljansvar i en komplex organisation.
   

  





 Du kan bryta ner komplexa frågor, väga behov, nytta och kostnader, och bygga underlag som håller för beslut. Du skapar struktur där det saknas – processer, agendor, beslutsvägar.
   

  





 Du kan kanalisera många olika behov in i ett gemensamt vägval utan att tappa förankringen längs vägen. Du kan sitta jämbördigt med kundernas högsta ledning och med erfarna avdelningschefer i produktionen.
   

  





 Du är van och trivs i forum, beredningar, dialoger och möten – det är där du gör ditt bästa arbete. Du värjer dig inte för obekväma samtal när de behövs.
   

  





 Du vill se att underlagen leder till beslut och att besluten omsätts i tjänster som faktiskt blir bättre – inte bara på papper. Du vet att verklig förändring tar tid och kräver förankring, och du håller i den hela vägen.
   

  





 Du är nyfiken på Region Stockholms verksamheter– vart vården, kollektivtrafiken och den regionala utvecklingen är på väg, och vad det betyder för våra tjänster.
   

  





**Krav** 



* Mångårig erfarenhet från liknande uppdrag i större komplex organisation till exempel i rollen som produktchef, produktägare projektledare eller samordnare – från IT-områden så som drift, kapacitet, arbetsplats/slutanvändartjänster, datakommunikation identitet, behörighet eller integration.
* Relevant akademisk examen (t.ex. ekonomi, systemvetenskap, teknik eller motsvarande) eller likvärdig erfarenhet.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att ta fram beslutsunderlag och driva utrednings- och beredningsprocesser fram till beslut i formella instanser.
* Erfarenhet av strategiskt arbete inom IT med ett tidsperspektiv som sträcker sig flera år framåt (5–10 år), inte enbart operativ leverans.
* Erfarenhet av intressentdialog på hög nivå i större organisation.
* Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka sig i tal och skrift på svenska.



**Meriterande** 



* Erfarenhet från offentlig sektor, region eller annan politiskt styrd organisation, inklusive förståelse för beslutsvägar, legala krav och målstyrning (till exempel fullmäktigemål).
* Erfarenhet av tjänstebaserad ekonomi/prissättningsmodeller (till exempel internprissättning, självkostnad, tjänstekatalog)
* Förståelse och erfarenhet av att implementera och praktisera IT-operativa modeller och ramverk (till exempel COBIT, ITIL eller motsvarande) och förståelse för tjänsteportföljstyrning i enlighet med dessa.



****Vårt erbjudande****




 Vi har kollektivavtal och med det följer kollektivavtalade försäkringar, tjänstepension och möjlighet till löneväxling. För att du ska kunna ta ansvar för din hälsa erbjuder vi friskvårdstimme och friskvårdsbidrag samt subventionerad sjukvård i form av kostnadsfri öppensjukvård. Flexibel arbetstid och möjlighet till att arbeta hemifrån har vi för att underlätta för dig att få ihop vardagen. Här kan du läsa mer om förmånerna i vårt kollektivavtal.
   

  





 Vi sitter i fina lokaler på Lindhagensgatan 98. Hit tar du dig enkelt med kollektivtrafiken.
   

  





****Ansökan****




 Låter det här som något för dig ser vi gärna att du söker så snart som möjligt då intervjuer och urval sker löpande. För en komplett ansökan räcker det med att bifoga ditt CV. När du ansöker kommer du att få besvara ett antal frågor, dessa ersätter personligt brev.
   

  





 Har du frågor är du välkommen att kontakta avdelningschef, Linda Jakobsson: linda.jakobsson@regionstockholm.se.
   

  





****Övrigt****




 Tester kan komma att ingå i rekryteringsprocessen som steg 2. Vi använder oss av Assessios tester MAP och Matrigma. MAP är ett personlighetstest och Matrigma är ett problemlösningstest som båda bygger på arbetspsykologisk forskning. Testerna används som ett komplement till dina erfarenheter och kompetenser.
   

  





 Det här är en arbetsplats för dig som gillar att ge service och vill att din insats ska göra skillnad. Vi på serviceförvaltningen ska underlätta vardagen för våra kollegor i Region Stockholms kärnverksamheter så att de kan fokusera på patienter, resenärer, invånare och besökare. Vi är 700 personer som arbetar med inköp och upphandling, löne- och personaladministration, ekonomi- och redovisningsadministration, it och medicinsk teknik, användarstöd, lokalservice med mera. Varmt välkommen till en arbetsplats där du blir en del av något större! Läs mer här
   

  





****Att söka jobb i Region Stockholm****




 Vi eftersträvar jämställdhet och jämlikhet på vår arbetsplats och ser gärna sökande med olika bakgrund och förutsättningar.
   

  





 Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via detta system. Ansök genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök”. Ansökningar per brev eller e-post beaktas inte. Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser.
   

  





 Vårt rekryteringssystem kan inte hantera anonyma ansökningar eller sökande med skyddade personuppgifter. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ber vi dig att kontakta den kontaktpersonen som finns angiven i annonsen. Din ansökan kommer då att hanteras utanför rekryteringssystemet. Du bör även vara försiktig med vilken information du lämnar i din ansökan och endast ta med information som är relevant för den aktuella befattningen.
   

  





 Region Stockholm ansvarar för hälso- och sjukvård, kollektivtrafik, regional utveckling och bidrar till kulturlivet. Varje dag, dygnet runt. I landets snabbaste växande region. Tillsammans skapar vi Europas attraktivaste storstadsregion.
   

  





 Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss i Region Stockholm

title: Senior Technical Engineer – Digital Workplace
description:
**Job Description**

 We’re looking for a
 **Senior Technical Engineer** 
 to join our
 **Digital Workplace team** 
 and play a key role in shaping how modern productivity platforms are designed, governed and evolved across H&M Group.
   

  





 This role combines deep technical expertise with a strong platform mindset. You’ll work with
 **Microsoft 365, Power Platform and Generative AI productivity tools** 
 to ensure our Digital Workplace is secure, scalable and ready for the future—while making everyday work easier for thousands of colleagues.
   

  





**WHAT YOU WILL DO**



* Govern and evolve core Digital Workplace platforms built on Microsoft 365.
* Design, configure and improve services across Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive and Copilot.
* Own governance and platform standards for Power Platform and Copilot Studio, balancing control with productivity and innovation.
* Enable and scale generative AI productivity tools, including Copilot and related AI experiences.
* Act as a senior technical advisor, setting standards, guiding best practices and supporting complex initiatives.
* Collaborate with architects, user adoption specialists, security and business stakeholders to balance innovation, governance and usability.
* Ensure platforms meet requirements for security, compliance, performance and lifecycle management.



**WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH**




 The Digital Workplace area is at the heart of enabling how over 100,000 H&M colleagues work every day — across stores, warehouses, offices, and creative environments globally. We are a team of 15-20 colleagues in Stockholm and India, that together with managing partners support our delivery daily.
   

  





 Our mission is to deliver secure, scalable, and user-friendly digital workplace platforms that empower colleagues to collaborate seamlessly, stay productive, and create business value. We work closely with stakeholders across the organization, co-creating solutions based on data, user needs, and evolving business priorities.
   

  





 We are responsible for the full Digital Workplace ecosystem — including Microsoft 365, collaboration services, devices, and creative and agile tools — ensuring a consistent and high-quality experience regardless of where or how our colleagues work.
   

  





 Our ambition is to ease the life of H&M colleagues through innovative solutions, while continuously balancing user experience, cost efficiency, and security.
   

  





 As part of our team, you will contribute to shaping the future of work at H&M — driving innovation in areas like AI-powered productivity, automation, and modern collaboration using platforms such as M365 and Power Platform.
   

  





**WHO YOU ARE**



* Solid experience in a senior technical engineer or similar role.
* Strong hands-on expertise within Microsoft 365 and the Power Platform.
* Practical experience with gen AI productivity tools, automation or AI-assisted workflows.
* A strong platform mindset—thinking in terms of scalability, reliability and long-term value.
* Experience in Azure low-code and serverless platforms (Power Apps, Functions, Logic Apps) for application development, integration, and automation.
* Experience working in large, complex or global environments.
* Clear communication skills and the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical audiences.



 Nice to have
   

  




* Experience with Copilot Studio, AI governance or Azure OpenAI–based solutions.
* Experience developing and maintaining simple, business-facing solutions built with SPFx.
* PowerShell or scripting for platform automation.
* Familiarity with ALM, DevOps or CI/CD for Power Platform.



**WHO WE ARE** 
  

  





 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future.
   

  





**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE** 
  

  





 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer our employees attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe.
   

  




* Staff discount card: Usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online.
* H&M Incentive Program (HIP): Included in our HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.
* Competitive pensions: Collective Agreement and ITP pensions competitive to the Swedish market.
* Generous vacation: 30 days' vacation, health care allowance, and good work-life balance.
* Additional perks: Discounts from Benify.
* Innovative Environment: Work with cutting-edge technology and innovative solutions.
* Global Impact: Be part of a team that influences users worldwide.
* Professional Growth: Endless opportunities to learn and develop your skills.
* Collaborative Culture: Join a motivated team that values collaboration and excellence.



**JOIN US** 
  

  





 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.
   

  





 This is a full-time permanent position, starting as soon as possible according to the agreement. The role is a hybrid position, based in our office in Stockholm, Sweden.
   

  





 Apply by sending in your CV in English as soon as possible. Due to data policies, we only accept applications through the career page.
   

  





 Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here. We are eager to meet you!
   

  





 \*We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application.

title: ITSM-konsult med fokus på ärendehantering och service management
description:
*Vi utmanar de traditionella konsultbolagen och vi kan med stolthet säga att Castra är konsultbranschens mest utvecklande arbetsplats där allt är möjligt. Känns det här som företaget för dig så läs gärna vidare.*
**Rollen**
 Implementering och vidareutveckling av ett nytt ärendehanteringssystem. Fokus ligger på att konfigurera, anpassa och optimera lösningen utifrån verksamhetens behov. Konsulten kommer att arbeta nära projektledare och verksamhet för att definiera krav, konfiguration, anpassning, delta i dialoger och bidra med expertkunskap under hela implementationsarbetet.
   

  

**Uppdragsbeskrivning**
 I rollen kommer konsulten att:
   

  

* Delta i workshops med verksamheten och bidra med specialistkompetens inom ärendehantering.
* Identifiera och dokumentera verksamhetens krav och behov kopplade till lösningen i samråd med projektledare.
* Konfigurera och anpassa ärendehanteringssystemet utifrån verksamhetens processer.
* Utforma och implementera processflöden och automatiseringar vid behov.
* Arbeta med uppsättning av processer för bland annat Service Requests och Incident Management.
* Samarbeta nära projektledare och verksamhetsrepresentanter för att säkerställa att lösningen stödjer verksamhetens mål.
* Bidra med rekommendationer kring best practice och framtida utvecklingsmöjligheter.


 Det finns även möjlighet att konsulten involveras i närliggande projekt och initiativ inom området.
   

  

**Kompetens:**
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av arbete med ärendehanteringssystem såsom Freshservice, ServiceNow, Jira eller motsvarande.
* Erfarenhet av konfigurering och anpassning av ärendehanteringssystem.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med krav i nära samarbete med projektledare och verksamhet.
* Förmåga att snabbt sätta sig in i nya system, processer och verksamhetsbehov.
* Erfarenhet av att delta aktivt i workshops med verksamheten.


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av ärendehantering kopplat till GDPR- och HR-processer.
* Erfarenhet av lösenordshantering och relaterade processer.
* Erfarenhet av Freshservice (Freshworks).
* Tidigare arbete med implementering och uppsättning av service management-processer.


**Personliga egenskaper**
 Vi lägger stor vikt vid personliga egenskaper. Konsulten bör vara:
   

  

* Självdriven och självgående.
* Målfokuserad och resultatorienterad.
* Kommunikativ och trygg i dialog med verksamheten.
* Orädd att ställa frågor och tydlig med vad som krävs för att driva arbetet framåt.
* Snabblärd och van att snabbt sätta sig in i nya miljöer och system.


**Varför ska du välja oss?**
 Här tror vi på frihet, möjligheter och medbestämmande. Att du som medarbetare ska ha möjlighet att utvecklas och forma ditt arbete utefter dina intressen och prioriteringar i livet. Att alla får vara med och forma och påverka bolaget genom delägarskap, advisory board och projektgrupper. Att det är viktigt att ha ett sammanhang, känna tillhörighet och att man har kollegor som stöttar, utvecklar och tror på en.
   

  

**Om Castra**
 Castra är en entreprenörsdriven konsultgrupp inom IT, management och systemutveckling. Bolaget ägs gemensamt av medarbetarna och tillsammans bygger vi det företag vi själva vill jobba på.
   

  

 Vår vision är att vi ska vara Sveriges bästa arbetsgivare för konsulter. Att vi blivit certifierade av Great Place to Work® fem år i rad är ett bevis på våra höga mål kring företagskultur. Våra tankar om delaktighet, påverkansmöjligheter och respekt för individens egna val och möjligheter fungerar.
   

  

 Företaget har kontor i Göteborg, Stockholm, Helsingborg, Malmö, Linköping, Norrköping, Örebro och Jönköping. Mer information om Castra-koncernen hittar du på vår hemsida www.castra.se.
   

  

**Har vi lyckats väcka din nyfikenhet?** 
 Sök direkt via länken eller kontakta thomas.florentin@castra.se Tfn: 070-5788391

title: Marketing Intern - Sweden (Part-Time, Fall Semester)
description:
**About Wolt**
 At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we’re building the delivery of (almost) everything and you’ll find us in over 500 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the globe.
   

  

 Working at Wolt isn’t always easy, but it’s definitely exciting. Here you’ll learn more, build more, and ship more than in most other companies. You’ll be challenged a lot, but also have a lot of fun on the way. So, if you’re a self-starter with drive and entrepreneurial spirit, this could be the ride of your life.
   

  

**Location:** 
 Stockholm, Sweden
   

  

**Team:** 
 Local Marketing
   

  

**Reporting to:** 
 Marketing Specialist / Marketing Manager
   

  

**Duration:** 
 September–December 2026 (12 weeks)
   

  

**Hours:** 
 20 hours per week or as otherwise agreed
   

  

 At Wolt, we're building the leading local commerce platform across Europe and Asia, helping people discover and get what they need, quickly and reliably.
   

  

 Marketing plays a key role in how we connect with customers, support local merchants, and bring our brand to life across channels. From local campaigns and social media initiatives to content creation and influencer collaborations, we are constantly looking for new ways to engage audiences and create meaningful customer experiences.
   

  

 As part of Wolt's Fall Semester Internship Program, we're looking for an ambitious final-year university student to join our Marketing team and gain hands-on experience working on real marketing initiatives with visible business impact.
   

  

**About The Role**
 This is not a traditional internship focused on observation and administrative support.
   

  

 As a Marketing Intern, you will support the execution of commercial and content marketing initiatives at the local level. Working closely with Marketing Specialists and Managers, you'll help bring campaigns to life by coordinating and executing tasks, preparing content, and assisting with operational and creative execution across multiple channels.
   

  

 This role is ideal for a student interested in pursuing a career in marketing, communications, social media, or consumer technology.
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
**Campaign Execution & Content Coordination**
* Assist in creating, localizing, and publishing marketing content across multiple channels, including in-app banners
* Use internal tools to help set up campaigns, schedule content and upload marketing assets
* Support the localization of global and regional marketing materials for the Swedish market
* Track campaign setup tasks and checklists to ensure assets are ready and campaigns are delivered on time


**Creative & Content Production**
* Collaborate with designers and content creators by preparing briefs, managing asset versions, and coordinating feedback
* Help organize marketing assets and ensure content is accurate and ready for launch
* Collect and organize user-generated content (UGC) for use across social media and campaign channels


**Social Media & Influencer Marketing**
* Help schedule and publish content on local social media channels under the guidance of the Marketing Specialist or Manager
* Assist with influencer outreach and campaign coordination
* Organize product deliveries, collect campaign content and coordinate timelines for influencer collaborations


**Cross-Functional Coordination**
* Assist in uploading and maintaining materials related to local merchant campaigns
* Coordinate timelines between the marketing team and other internal stakeholders to support the smooth rollout of initiatives


**What We're Looking For**
**Must Have**
* Currently in the final year of a Bachelor's or Master's degree
* Strong interest in marketing, communications, social media, or consumer technology
* Excellent organizational and coordination skills
* Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously
* Strong communication skills in English
* Proactive attitude and willingness to learn and take ownership


**Nice to Have**
* Previous internship, student organization, or project experience in marketing, communications, business, or startups
* Experience with social media platforms and content creation
* Familiarity with project coordination and stakeholder management
* Interest in technology, e-commerce, marketplaces or consumer brands


**What Success Looks Like**
 By the end of the internship, you will have:
   

  

* Contributed to the successful delivery of multiple local marketing campaigns
* Supported content creation and campaign execution across various marketing channels
* Developed practical experience in campaign operations, social media and influencer marketing
* Built strong stakeholder management and project coordination skills
* Gained hands-on experience working in a fast-paced marketing environment


**Why this role matters**
 This internship is designed to give talented students meaningful responsibility while helping Wolt identify future marketing talent.
   

  

 You'll gain practical experience across campaign execution and measurement, social media, influencer and content marketing, as well as marketing operations while working on projects that directly impact how Wolt grows in Sweden.
   

  

 High-performing interns may be considered for future full-time opportunities following graduation.
   

  

**Why join Wolt?**
* Work on real projects with visible business impact
* Learn from experienced marketing professionals
* Gain hands-on experience across multiple areas of marketing
* Collaborate with teams across Marketing, Creative, Commercial, and Operations
* Build practical skills that accelerate your marketing career
* Create a pathway toward future full-time opportunities at Wolt


**Next steps**
 If you're excited about learning how modern marketing works, developing practical experience, and making an impact while you study, we'd love to hear from you.
   

  

 After submitting your application, our Talent Acquisition team will review your profile. If it looks like a good fit, you'll go through a short interview process with the hiring manager and team. The process is designed to be transparent, efficient, and give you a real sense of what working at Wolt is like.
   

  

 Please note that we do not accept applications sent by email, please submit your application through our careers website.
   

  

 Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion
   

  

 We’re committed to growing and empowering a more inclusive community within our company, industry, and cities. That’s why we hire and cultivate diverse teams of people from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe that true innovation happens when everyone has room at the table and the tools, resources, and opportunity to excel.

title: Creative Growth Manager
description:
**Creative Growth Manager**

  





 Common Clouds is looking for a creative, brand-obsessed and hands-on Creative Growth Manager to join us in building the next generation skincare brand for acne-prone skin.
 



  





 We’re looking for someone who understands how brand, content, aesthetics, storytelling and customer experience work together to create growth. Someone who gets internet culture, has sharp creative instincts and an eye for both aesthetics and analytics.
 



  





 At Common Clouds, we believe brand and community are just as important as performance, and we’re looking for someone who thrives when building both.
 



  





 You’ll work closely with the founders and team across marketing, growth, e-commerce, CRM and digital brand experience, and play a key role in how Common Clouds builds our universe across channels and markets.
 



  





 WHAT YOU’LL DO
 



  





 \* Create and adapt content, copy and creative assets for paid, CRM and e-commerce channels
 



 \* Create flows, newsletters and campaigns in Klaviyo with strong visual and written communication
 



 \* Collaborate closely with brand and creative teams across campaigns, launches and digital touchpoints
 



 \* Set the creative strategy for paid marketing across Meta and TikTok and execute it
 



 \* Test and evolve creatives, audiences, landing pages and customer journeys
 



 \* Work hands-on in Shopify with site updates and e-commerce optimisation
 



 \* Drive launches and scale initiatives on TikTok Shop in new markets
 



 \* Coordinate external partners and agencies when needed
 



  





 WE THINK YOU
 



  





 \* Have 2+ years of experience from e-commerce, DTC or fast-growing consumer brands
 



 \* Are obsessed with branding, design and copy, and enjoy working hands-on with content and creative production
 



 \* Have worked hands-on with Shopify and Klaviyo
 



 \* Understand how aesthetics, storytelling and digital experience affect growth and conversion
 



 \* Stay curious about new discovery channels and how brands grow online
 



 \* Are self-driven, fast-moving and comfortable with high ownership
 



 \* Communicate fluently in Swedish and English, both written and spoken
 



  





 BONUS IF YOU
 



  





 \* Have experience within beauty, skincare or lifestyle
 



 \* Have experience working with TikTok Shop or international e-commerce
 



 \* Have experience using Meta Ads Manager and TikTok Ads Manager
 



  





 ABOUT COMMON CLOUDS
 



  





 Common Clouds is a Swedish skincare brand dedicated to acne-prone and sensitive skin.
 



  





 We create gentle, effective skincare while building a more honest and kind world around acne.
 



  





 Since launching in 2022, we’ve become one of Sweden’s leading acne skincare brands and are now available through retailers including H&M Beauty, Matas and Kronans Apotek.
 



  





 We’re building a brand where community, storytelling, culture and digital experience are just as important as performance. We’re not building another skincare brand — we’re building a world.
 



  





 THE PRACTICALS
 



  





 \* Full-time
 



 \* 6-month probationary period
 



 \* Based in our Stockholm office
 



 \* Start date: August 2026
 



  





 HOW TO APPLY
 



  





 Send your CV, examples of work or portfolio, and a short introduction to jobs@commonclouds.com.
 



  





 Subject line: Creative Growth Manager
 



  





 We’re looking forward to hearing from you.
 



  





 Maria, Cajsa & Helena
 



 Founders, Common Clouds

title: Station Tech Specialist
description:
* Urval sker löpande
* Hybrid


 Arbetsuppgifter
   

  

*Hela samhället ställer om mot en fossilfri framtid. Vi vill visa vägen i utvecklingen av vår bransch, så att fler kan ta sig fram, ta hand om sitt fordon och driva verksamheter med ett så lågt klimatavtryck som möjligt. Vill du vara med och bidra till hållbar utveckling, på riktigt? Välkommen att följa med på vår resa!*
 OKQ8 genomgår just nu en av våra största digitala satsningar någonsin. Vi moderniserar stationer i både Sverige och Danmark, från utrustningen ute på stationen till tekniken i butiken. Nu söker vi en tekniskt vass och strukturerad specialist som vill spela en nyckelroll i denna transformation.
   

  

 I den här rollen blir du den som får systemen att fungera i praktiken. Du kombinerar mjukvarukonfiguration, hårdvaruförståelse och teknisk support för allt från betalterminaler och prisskyltar till pumpar och kassasystem. Du blir dessutom en central länk mellan våra servicetekniker och leverantörer.
   

  

**Dina huvudsakliga ansvarsområden**
* Konfigurera och sätta upp stationernas tekniska system
* Stötta digitaliseringsinitiativ i butik, exempelvis kameror och nätverkslösningar för obemannade koncept
* Koppla samman hårdvara och mjukvara på stationerna
* Felsöka via loggar och teknisk analys
* Hantera felanmälningar och följa upp kända problem
* Testa och kvalitetssäkra nya mjukvarureleaser
* Ge telefonsupport och guida tekniker vid installationer och fel
* Agera superanvändare i våra system
* Säkerställa korrekt dokumentation av konfigurationer och installerad utrustning
* Övervaka och förbättra systemprestanda
* Validera rättningar och uppdateringar


 Du kommer främst att arbeta i systemen eMIS, OnePortal, PetrolServer och PetrolManager.
   

  

 Kvalifikationer
   

  

**Vi söker dig som**
* Har en tekniskt stark profil och trivs i gränslandet mellan hårdvara och mjukvara
* Har erfarenhet av tekniska system – gärna från energi-, automations- eller betalningsindustrin
* Har grundläggande nätverkskunskap och förståelse för systemintegration
* Är van vid att arbeta med loggfiler och strukturerad felsökning
* Kommunicerar tydligt och professionellt, både muntligt och skriftligt
* Har god ordning, följer upp ärenden och håller dokumentation uppdaterad
* Har erfarenhet av test- och releasehantering (meriterande)
* Behärskar svenska och engelska; danska är ett plus


**Vi erbjuder**
 Hos oss på OKQ8 får du arbeta i en flexibel miljö med viktiga och varierande arbetsuppgifter. Vi uppmuntrar samarbete, innovation och utveckling – och vi tror på att vi tillsammans gör varandra bättre. Här blir du en del av en familjär kultur där vi stöttar varandra, har roligt tillsammans och där du ges möjlighet att växa och göra skillnad. Vi vill vara ett företag som speglar samhället, med en inkluderande kultur som minskar utanförskap och främjar mångfald.
   

  

**Övrig information**
 Har du frågor om rekryteringsprocessen vänligen kontakta Talent Partner Nabila
   

  

**Placeringsort:** 
 Stockholm, Sveavägen. Vi ser gärna att man är inne på kontoret några dagar i veckan.
   

  

**Tillträde:** 
 Enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

**Anställningsform:** 
 Tillsvidareanställning med sex månaders provanställning
   

  

 För den här tjänsten behöver du vara medborgare i Sverige, ett annat nordiskt land eller ett EU/EES-land, ha permanent uppehållstillstånd i Sverige eller vara asylsökande med rätt att arbeta. Du ska kunna styrka ditt medborgarskap eller din rätt att arbeta i Sverige under rekryteringsprocessen.
   

  

*I* 
*rekryteringsprocessen ingår både psykometriska tester och kompetensbaserade intervjuer, med syfte att främja en rättvis utvärdering för alla kandidater.*
**Välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: Generated Content Reviewer
description:
JHC Consulting is an independent advisory practice based in the United States that provide counsel to heads of industry, board committees, and chief executives. We are seeking a Generated Content Reviewer currently based in Sweden to support our internal quality assurance processes. This engagement is a part-time contract role paid a fixed wage. Because our work centers on the belief that written argument produces sharper thinking than conversation, we require a high degree of precision in our internal documentation. This position is a structured part of our workflow, requiring a focused approach to document verification and claim assessment within a hybrid office environment.
   

  

**The role**
 In this role, your primary responsibility is to ensure the integrity of the firm's written records. This involves reviewing AI-assisted drafts, summaries, and internal documents to maintain absolute factual consistency. You will be tasked with checking claims against source material to verify that every statement is rooted in evidence. A significant portion of your time will be spent identifying unsupported, unclear, or inaccurate statements that do not meet our firm's standards for analytical rigor.
   

 The work is highly structured. You will follow detailed review instructions to provide a consistent check across multiple documents. When you encounter recurring issues or linguistic patterns that obscure the meaning of an argument, you will document these findings for the principals. In cases where the source material is ambiguous, you will be responsible for escalating those instances to ensure the final memorandum remains defensible. This is an essential function in our internal QA and documentation workflows, ensuring that our archive of signed work remains accurate over time.
   

  

**What we are looking for**
 We need individuals who possess a high level of intellectual maturity and a disciplined approach to reading. This is an entry level role, so we do not expect a long career in advisory work, but we do require an exceptional standard of written English and an eye for detail. You should be someone who enjoys the process of careful scrutiny and who finds satisfaction in tracing a claim back to its original source. The ability to maintain consistency across repeated review work is vital.
   

 Analytical background is helpful, particularly if you have experience in academic research or technical writing where factual accuracy is the primary metric of success. You must be comfortable working independently and managing your own time within a part-time schedule. We value the courage to name when a document is unclear or when a summary has failed to capture the nuance of the underlying argument. Being based in Sweden is a requirement, as you will need to participate in hybrid work sessions at our office to coordinate with the local team on complex documentation projects.
   

  

**How we work**
 JHC Consulting is a small, deliberate firm focused on governance, strategy, and leadership. We differ from traditional consultancies in our rejection of slide decks and presentation ceremonies. Our primary output is the signed memorandum. This commitment to the written word means that every piece of work we produce is authored by a specific person who takes individual accountability for the contents. The discipline of the written word is our core value.
   

 We accept a limited number of mandates each quarter to ensure that every document receives the thorough reading it deserves. This environment is quiet and focused. We expect every person involved in our process, including contractors, to respect the privacy of the advisory relationship and the sensitivity of the internal cases we handle. Our way of working is built on the idea that the document is the work, and the work must be beyond reproach.
   

  

**Working at JHC Consulting**
 The workplace arrangement for this role is hybrid. You will conduct most of your document review work remotely while coming into the office in Sweden for scheduled coordination and review meetings. This balance provides individual autonomy while maintaining the necessary connection to our documentation standards. As this is a part-time contract role, it is designed for those who value a structured, professional engagement alongside other commitments.
   

 Success in this position is measured by the clarity and accuracy of the documents you verify. We look for colleagues who understand that in high-level advisory work, there is no room for vague statements or unverified claims. By maintaining the quality of our internal drafts, you support our principals in providing the honest, dissenting read that our clients value. The role provides exposure to the rigorous standards of a private advisory practice where the author's name sits at the foot of every page.

title: Engineering Manager - Connectivity
description:
**About Atlar**
 Atlar is the AI-native treasury platform used by today's leading growth companies to manage cash, payments, forecasting, and liquidity in one place. Teams at Lovable, GetYourGuide, Storytel, Tide, Trustly, and Zilch use Atlar to connect their banks and ERPs in a single platform, save thousands of hours of manual work, unlock idle cash, and reduce errors at scale.
   

  

 Atlar is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden, and backed by Index Ventures, investors in category-defining companies such as Adyen, Revolut, Figma, and more.
   

  

**About The Role**
 The Connectivity team builds and operates the integrations that connect Atlar to the world's banks — the foundation every customer go-live runs on. You will lead this team of seven engineers (growing to nine), including some of our most senior people, and report to the Engineering Director.
   

  

 This is not a typical product-engineering team. Connectivity's backlog is driven primarily by our commercial pipeline: new customers signed by Sales flow through Delivery and land here as bank integration work that gates their go-live. The Delivery team is, in effect, your main internal customer — alongside the actual customer waiting to go live. That makes this role first and foremost an operational-excellence role: the job is to build a lean, predictable, high-throughput delivery machine, with the capacity visibility the rest of the company plans against.
   

  

 The second half of the mandate follows from the first: you own the prioritization and delivery of the tooling that makes the team more efficient. We deliberately solve capacity problems with tooling and automation rather than by hiring linearly — there is a long roadmap of high-leverage things to build here, and deciding what to build, when, is yours.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Lead the Connectivity team: one-on-ones, coaching, career development, hiring, and the hard conversations — you are accountable for the health, growth, and output of everyone on the team.
* Build and run a predictable delivery machine: planning cadence, intake from the Delivery team, prioritization, in-sprint execution — keeping the team on the highest-priority work and resolving priority conflicts as they arise — and the balance of speed and quality that a payments platform demands.
* Own capacity planning and visibility — go-live scheduling, throughput metrics, and a work-tracking board that reflects reality — with early, honest flagging of constraints and delays, so the rest of the company can plan and commit against engineering reality.
* Own the prioritization and delivery of internal tooling and automation that increases the team's throughput, so capacity scales faster than headcount.
* Be the interface between Connectivity and the rest of the company — Delivery, Sales, Customer Success, Product — on what gets prioritized, when work lands, and how things get escalated.
* Run the team's hiring: own the pipeline, the process, and the quality bar, starting with the two open positions.
* Apply the performance framework: run the review cycle, level your people honestly, and take part in cross-team calibration.
* Run the engineering side of incidents on the team's surface — response, remediation, and postmortems.
* Stay close to the code — design and code reviews, occasional contributions off the critical path — but your output is the team, not your commits. Technical direction sits with the team's senior and staff engineers; making it land predictably sits with you.


 What You Need
   

  

* Bachelor's degree from an accredited university.
* 2+ years of experience managing software engineers directly, with a track record of building high-performing teams.
* Demonstrated experience building repeatable delivery processes and operational machinery — not just running agile ceremonies, but designing the system the team runs on.
* Experience leading a team whose work is externally driven — integrations, platform or infrastructure engineering with internal customers, professional-services-adjacent engineering, or similar — where throughput and predictability are the product.
* Strong enough technically to earn the trust of senior engineers and to interrogate an estimate — our stack is Go on AWS — without needing to be the best engineer in the room.
* Excellent verbal and written English communication skills, and the ability to manage expectations across commercial and technical stakeholders.
* High adaptability and ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment.


 Nice-to-Haves
   

  

* Experience with bank connectivity protocols and channels (ISO 20022, SWIFT, EBICS, host-to-host).
* Experience in payments, fintech, or another regulated environment.
* Experience building internal tooling or automation that materially changed a team's throughput.
* Experience at a high-growth startup.


*This role is on-site at our Stockholm headquarters.*

title: Information Security & IT Manager
description:
**What We Do At Detectify**
 We’re Detectify, and we’re not your average cybersecurity company. We’re a team obsessed with building cutting-edge tech that actually makes a difference in making the internet a safer place. We’re talking about real-life hackers who know their stuff—you’ll learn from the best and join a team that combines human ingenuity with automation to streamline asset discovery and vulnerability assessments.
   

  

**What You’ll Get To Do**
 As Information Security & IT Manager, your primary responsibility is owning the information security level at Detectify. You'll ensure that our security posture aligns with ISO 27001 and any other objectives set by management — embedding information security into daily operations, keeping the company current on evolving frameworks and guidelines, and driving the strategic IT-security initiatives that enable us to meet our goals.
   

  

 Around 20% of your time covers the IT administration that keeps Detectify running smoothly — provisioning devices, managing account access, and making sure every colleague has the right tools from day one. The remaining 80% is where the real depth of the role lives: shaping and maturing how we think about and practice information security across the company.
   

  

 Reporting to the CFO, you'll be part of our Operations team — spanning Finance, IT, Legal and People & Culture — acting as a cross-functional bridge that simplifies complexity and sets the standard for how a security-first company operates.
   

  

**Concretely, You'll Be Responsible For**
* Maintaining and continuously improving Detectify's ISMS, keeping us aligned with ISO 27001 certification requirements
* Enabling AI adoption across the company by evaluating, procuring, and governing AI tools to ensure they meet our security and compliance standards
* Identity and Access Management for IT systems outside of the product environment
* Evaluating IT tools and third-party vendors, and supporting their implementation and configuration
* Acting as system owner for company-wide IT infrastructure — Google Workspace, Jira, Slack and beyond
* Negotiating with software and hardware suppliers and owning the related processes and policies
* Onboarding and offboarding colleagues from an IT perspective, including continuously improving these processes
* Providing technical support and handling IT tickets across the organisation
* Ensuring all employees have the right hardware, software, and physical office setup to work securely and effectively


**Who You Are**
 You're a person that has a collaborative and proactive mindset combined with technical skills.
   

  

**We Also Think You Have**
* Hands on experience of driving and improving IT processes, IT support, access management and asset inventory (physical and information assets)
* Experience of OS provisioning and Network knowledge
* IT Security knowledge and hands on experience of SSO
* ISO 27001 experience
* Experience of Jira and Google workspace


 As a person you are self-going and have a good eye for spotting improvements and appreciate a fast moving environment. To be successful in this role, we believe you have a solid service mindset and thrive working in an international environment. We expect you to be proficient English skills both written and verbal.
   

  

**Hybrid work**
 This position is for the Stockholm office. We offer hybrid working, with access to our office in central Stockholm and would like to see you at the office at least 3 days per week.
   

  

**So, what do you think?** 
 We are proud to foster an inclusive workplace free from discrimination. We strongly believe that diversity of experience, perspectives, and background will lead to a better environment for our employees and a better product. This is something we value deeply and we encourage everyone to be a part of changing the way the world thinks about security! Go hack yourself!
   

  

 Detectify sets a new standard for advanced application security testing, challenging traditional Dynamic Application Security Testing (DAST) by providing evolving coverage of each and every exposed asset across the changing attack surface. AppSec teams trust Detectify to expose how attackers will exploit their Internet-facing applications.
   

  

 The Detectify platform automates continuous real-world, payload-based attacks fuelled by its global community of elite ethical hackers into its own expert-built engines, exposing critical weaknesses before it's too late. Go hack yourself.

title: Account Manager
description:
**About Kaseya**
 Kaseya is the leading provider of AI-powered IT management and cybersecurity software, serving Managed Service Providers (MSPs) and internal IT organizations worldwide. Our comprehensive platform helps organizations efficiently manage, secure, and automate their IT environments, driving operational efficiency and long-term business success.
   

  

 Backed by Insight Partners, a leading global software investor, Kaseya has experienced sustained double-digit growth and continues to expand its global footprint. Today, Kaseya supports customers in more than 20 countries and manages over 15 million endpoints worldwide.
   

  

 Founded in 2000, Kaseya has built a culture centered around innovation, accountability, and results. We are a high-growth, high-performance organization that values individuals who are driven, adaptable, and committed to delivering exceptional outcomes for our customers and teammates alike.
   

  

 At Kaseya, success comes from embracing challenges, moving with urgency, and continuously raising the bar.
   

  

**Position Summary**
 Kaseya is looking for an enthusiastic and results-driven
 **Account Manager** 
 to focus on the expansion of existing accounts. In this role, you will be responsible for identifying new growth opportunities within your portfolio, strengthening relationships with existing clients, and driving revenue growth through strategic account management.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Account Expansion: Proactively engage with current customers to identify upsell and cross-sell opportunities, leveraging Kaseya’s full suite of products to drive revenue growth.
* Customer Relationship Management: Build and maintain strong relationships with key decision-makers, ensuring customer satisfaction while aligning their needs with Kaseya’s solutions.
* Strategic Sales Execution: Develop tailored strategies for each account, including regular check-ins and business reviews, to identify new opportunities and overcome potential challenges.
* Manage Adoption Metrics: Monitor customer usage, proactively addressing adoption challenges and following established sales processes to drive cross-sell, upsell, and expansion strategies.
* Revenue Growth: Take ownership of your sales targets, consistently exceeding quotas while delivering exceptional value to clients. Actively contribute to both short-term and long-term revenue generation strategies.
* Collaboration: Work closely with internal teams, including Customer Success and Sales, to deliver exceptional customer experiences and ensure smooth implementation of new solutions.
* CRM Management: Utilize Salesforce to manage leads, opportunities, and accounts, ensuring all interactions are logged and tracked to drive sales success.


**Required Qualifications**
* 2+ years’ experience in Saas sales (preferably in the Swedish market)
* Native Swedish Language with English fluency
* Driven, passionate about sales, and eager to earn significant sales commissions
* Exceptional inside sales experience in a metrics driven, fast-paced sales environment
* Has a proven track record of crushing sales goals
* A motivated, coachable and competitive go-getter, a resilient achiever driven to win and excel
* An energetic team player with exceptional organizational, interpersonal, and communication skills
* Create weekly, monthly and rolling 6 weeks’ sales forecasts.
* Exposure to CRM applications (Salesforce) to successfully manage leads, opportunities and accounts


**Additional Information**
*Kaseya provides equal employment opportunity to all employees and applicants without regard to race, religion, age, ancestry, gender, sex, sexual orientation, national origin, citizenship status, physical or mental disability, veteran status, marital status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.*

title: Senior Embedded & Electronics Engineer
description:
**Create the next generation of intelligent water leak detectors at Quandify!** 




  





**🌏 About Us** 
  
 



 At Quandify, we're more than just a tech company. With our patented, state-of-the-art technology, we are revolutionizing leakage detection and water monitoring. Our seamless integration of cutting-edge hardware and software solutions pushes the boundaries of water management possibilities. Within the walls of Quandify all parts of our system is designed and developed by us, from sensors → mechanics → electronics → backend and app.
 



 The future is green, and with our products, customers have seen a decrease of up to 30% in water usage, contributing to a sustainable environment and avoiding unnecessary renovation caused by water damage.
 



  





 ⚡ 
 **Who are you?** 
  
 



 You're the kind of engineer who lights up when a prototype works on the third try, and gets even more excited digging into why it didn't. You think in schematics and state machines, and you find real satisfaction in making hardware and firmware work together seamlessly. Whether you're debugging a tricky timing issue on a scope, optimizing power consumption on a battery-driven IoT device, or bringing up a new PCB, you're in your element.
 



 If you want to be part of building the next generation of smart water sensors, this may be your chance.
 



  





 🔧 
 **What do we offer?** 



* Work closely with the software and commercial teams in developing new features: full product lifecycle under one roof.
* Full ownership from concept through schematic, layout, firmware, testing and production. A true 🌾 → 🍞 experience.
* Lab day: spend one day each month to develop your skills and experiment with new technology.



  





 🛠️ 
 **Your Skillset** 



* Strong skills in either C or C++ programming for resource-constrained environments.
* Solid understanding of electronics: PCB design, prototyping, testing, and taking designs through to manufacturing.
* Experience with microcontroller ecosystems (e.g. ESP32, STM32, TI MSP430, or similar).
* Familiarity with wireless protocols and IoT frameworks (e.g., BLE, WiFi, LoRa, MQTT, Thread).
* A foundation in physics and mathematics that helps you reason about signals, power, and real-world constraints.



  





 ⭐ 
 **Meritorious** 



* Broader programming skills beyond embedded (Python, scripting, tooling).
* Experience developing IoT hardware products that have shipped to real users.
* Enjoy automating testing to bring comfort in releasing often



  





 🎓 
 **Background** 
  
 



 Academic education in embedded systems, electronics, mechatronics, electrical engineering, or equivalent experience.
 



  





 🤔 
 **Not a 100% match?** 
  
 



 No worries! We believe in potential over checkboxes. We know that talent can't always be defined by a resume. If you're passionate about what we're achieving at Quandify and bring some of the skills, but not all, we still want to hear from you.
 



  





 🚀 
 **Ready to make waves in the sustainable tech industry?** 
  
 



 Drop your resume, and let's start this journey together. We're excited to get to know the engineer in you!

title: Product Expert Network Security
description:
*Vill du vara med och framtidssäkra Länsförsäkringars nätverkssäkerhet? Som Product Expert – Network Security får du en nyckelroll i att utveckla våra hybrida nätverkstjänster, både on-prem och i publika moln. Du blir en del av Private Cloud Platforms, där vi driver framåtlutade initiativ för att skapa säkra, tillförlitliga och kostnadseffektiva lösningar som stöttar hela LF.*
**Om jobbet**
 Som Product Expert – Network Security får du en central roll i att säkerställa och utveckla våra nätverkssäkerhetstjänster inom området Private Cloud Platforms, som ingår i Development Solutions & Operation Platforms. Vårt uppdrag är att leverera tillgängliga, säkra och stabila hybrida IT-infrastrukturtjänster som möter både dagens och framtidens behov. Du arbetar nära Product Owner Network, IT-säkerhetsavdelningen samt andra interna och externa partners för att ta fram och realisera innovativa tekniska lösningar. Tillvaron är dynamisk och präglas av en pågående digital förflyttning, där du får stora möjligheter att påverka hur vi stärker våra nätverksleveranser och vår säkerhetsnivå. Rollen rapporterar till chefen för Private Cloud Platforms, medan den dagliga arbetsledningen sker av produktägaren för Network.
   

  

 Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer vara bland annat:
   

  

* Säkerställa och utveckla våra nätverkssäkerhetstjänster, både on-prem och i publika moln.
* Kravställa och följa upp mot externa partners och leverantörer.
* Hantera incidenter och problem.
* Driva kontinuerliga förbättringar och säkerställa kvaliteten på leveranserna.
* Erbjuda tekniskt stöd till interna konsumenter.
* Utveckla och implementera vår Product Road Map.


 Följande kommer göra dig framgångsrik i denna tjänst:
   

  

* Relevant kompetens inom området genom akademisk utbildning (t.ex. data-/systemvetenskap, civilingenjör) eller motsvarande arbetslivserfarenhet.
* God erfarenhet av infrastrukturell utveckling och teknisk kravhantering gentemot externa partners och leverantörer.
* Gedigen erfarenhet av drift och design av brandväggar, WAAP (Web Application and API Protection), DDoS-skydd, global lastbalansering samt proxy-tjänster från ledande leverantörer.
* Stark förmåga att driva mot en hög grad av automation i hanteringen av ovanstående plattformar.
* Kompetens och erfarenhet av loggning, monitorering och säkerhetsarbete, exempelvis härdning av hårdvara och mjukvara.
* Erfarenhet av riskhantering och arbete med säkerhetsramverk och tillhörande revisioner (t.ex. ISO27001, CIS, NIS/NIS2 och DORA).
* Vana att arbeta med förändringshantering och ramverk som ITIL och SAFe.
* Du har mycket god kommunikations- och presentationsförmåga och kan förmedla komplex information på ett enkelt och tydligt sätt, både på svenska och engelska


 Meriterande är även om du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av den operativa processen att designa och hantera en produkt eller tjänst under hela dess livscykel.
* Erfarenhet av att effektivisera ditt dagliga arbete med hjälp av AI-verktyg.


 Som person är du självgående och har förmågan att driva ditt arbete framåt självständigt, samtidigt som du är en lagspelare som stöttar och samarbetar nära med dina kollegor. Du har en stark helhetssyn som hjälper dig att nå både dina egna och teamets mål.
