title: Senior IAM Engineer | SEB, Solna
description:
The IAM Platform team is now looking for a new team member. We work closely together and share the passion for great technology and creating a smooth engineering experience. Our group consists of people with different expertise, experiences, age and background. We have an open and friendly approach towards each other.
   

  

**About the role:**
 At this position within Integrations & Connectivity, you will join a highly skilled IAM team responsible for designing, building, and operating SEB’s Identity and Access Management platforms across both on-prem and cloud environments. The team works with modern IAM technologies, strong security practices, and deeply integrated solutions that are part of SEB’s DevOps toolchains and digital platforms.
   

  

 As a Senior IAM Engineer, you will take an active role in evolving our IAM platforms by analyzing needs, designing architecture, and implementing robust technical solutions. IAM is a highly prioritized area at SEB, which means close collaboration with development teams, security, cloud, and infrastructure units across the organization. You will also be a key contributor to SEB’s cloud journey, ensuring that IAM capabilities support scalable, secure, and compliant cloud services.
   

  

**You will be responsible for:**
* Designing and implementing IAM solutions and architectures
* Operating and evolving IAM platforms and infrastructure
* Supporting cloud and platform onboarding with secure IAM patterns
* Troubleshooting identity related issues and ensuring compliance with security policies
* Continuously improving the organization’s overall security posture in close collaboration with cross- functional teams


**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* 5 years or more experience within IAM engineering. Expert and hands on experience on access management tools
* Good knowledge of networking fundamentals (TLS, DNS, proxies, firewalls, VPNs)
* Advanced knowledge of certificate management and PKI, including handling SSL/TLS certificates
* Advanced knowledge with identity federation technology (ex. OpenID Connect, OAuth2).
* Experience on managing different IDP solutions (Identity providers)
* Good knowledge with Single Sign-On and Multi Factor Authentication solution (ex. FIDO2).
* Advanced knowledge with DevSecOps tools (e.g. managing platforms with Kubernetes, Docker, Git, Github actions).
* Advanced knowledge in programming languages, such as Java, Python, Go, Spring or Javascript.
* Good knowledge in Linux, Idap, Openshift and Infra-as-code (Terraform, Ansible and Helm)
* Experience working in hybrid and multi-cloud enterprise environments, including secure integration across multiple cloud providers and on-premises platforms.
* Hands-on experience with one or more enterprise identity platforms, such as Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD), Keycloak, or Curity.
* Experience operating within complex and highly integrated IT environments.
* Advanced troubleshooting capabilities and a deep understanding of IT infrastructure with the ability to diagnose and resolve complex identity and access issues across diverse systems and environments.


**What we offer:**
* An international and empowering environment with highly skilled colleagues.
* Work-life balance & hybrid way of working.
* Extensive training and learning opportunities.
* Friendly and welcoming culture.
* Exciting opportunity to be part of transforming an industry.
* Attractive compensation and benefits.


 Do you want to be part of SEB?
   

  

 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial to our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today.. If you have questions about the position, please contact our talent acquisition partner louise.almberg@seb.se Please not that we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment
   

  

 Learn more about working at SEB here: sebgroup.com/techcareers
   

  

 https://sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 https://bit.ly/SEBcareer

title: Senior frontendutvecklare – Azure & DevOps
description:
Vi på WeQuel söker en erfaren frontendutvecklare med djupa kunskaper inom drift, säkerhet och observability för ett spännande konsultuppdrag hos vår kund i Stockholm. Här handlar utveckling inte bara om teknik – utan om att skapa smarta, stabila och användarvänliga lösningar som gör verklig skillnad i kundmötet.
   

  

 Om uppdraget
   

  

 Du arbetar i ett team som utvecklar system och applikationer för kundservice i en verksamhet med höga krav på tydlighet, tillgänglighet och driftsäkerhet. Teamet arbetar med moderna tekniker i en agil och samarbetsorienterad miljö – ni bygger lösningar tillsammans, lär av varandra och har kul längs vägen.
   

  

**Krav**
* 7–10 års erfarenhet av modern frontendutveckling med fokus på React, inklusive frontend-nära infrastruktur såsom CI/CD, bygg- och deployprocesser samt molnbaserade plattformar
* Mycket goda kunskaper i React, HTML5 och CSS
* Stark erfarenhet av Azure i produktion – gärna inom AKS, Azure Monitor/Application Insights samt nätverk/ingress/edge-flöden
* God förståelse för observability i Azure
* Erfarenhet av GitOps (ArgoCD) och CI/CD (GitHub Actions eller motsvarande) samt releaseprocesser
* Erfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code, gärna Terraform för applikationsnära Azure-resurser (t.ex. monitorering och dashboards)
* Erfarenhet av att driva incidenthantering och förbättringsarbete
* Erfarenhet av testautomatisering


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av komponentbibliotek och återanvändbara komponenter
* Testning med Vitest, React Testing Library eller Playwright
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i större organisationer med många intressenter
* Agila arbetssätt samt erfarenhet av Jira och Confluence


**Vi tror att du är**
* Strukturerad och drivande, med god kommunikativ förmåga i tal och skrift
* En lagspelare med hög samarbetsförmåga – lyhörd och nyfiken
* Självgående, men trygg med par- och mobprogrammering
* Motiverad av att skapa lösningar som förenklar vardagen för kundservicemedarbetare

title: Databricks Architect/Engineer - Tieto Tech Consulting (m/f/d)
description:
Jobbeskrivning
   

  

**Tietos verksamhet inom Data/AI söker nu en Data Architect eller en Data Engineer med fokus på Databricks som vill bidra till vår och våra kunders utveckling.**
 Har du praktisk erfarenhet av att migrera traditionella BI-lösningar till moderna plattformar med Databricks? Vill du både designa arkitekturen och själv bygga pipelines, modeller och transformationer? Då kanske du är vår nästa kollega!
   

  

 Vi söker dig som vill leda och driva utvecklingen av moderna dataplattformar – från förstudie och arkitektur till implementering och förvaltning. Du kommer spela en central roll i transformationen från äldre lösningar som Azure Synapse och SSIS till ett framtidssäkrat Lakehouse baserat på
 **Databricks** 
 ,
 **Apache Spark** 
 och
 **dbt.**
**Din roll som data engineer/data architect inom Databricks på Tieto Tech Consulting**
 Som arkitekt hos oss får du en central roll i att designa och implementera moderna. dataplattformar – ofta med Databricks som nav. Du arbetar nära kundens verksamhet, tar ansvar för skalbarhet, säkerhet och prestanda, och bidrar till en datadriven kultur både hos kund och internt. Du jobbar i uppdrag som ofta sträcker sig över 1–2 år, antingen som en del av ett större team eller som specialist.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifterna Kan Bland Annat Inkludera**
* Design och implementering av skalbara plattformar med fokus på Databricks.
* Migrering från traditionella miljöer som Azure Synapse.
* Kodning i Python och hantering av CI/CD i Azure DevOps.
* Strukturera Medallion-arkitektur och säkra kvalitet i olika datalager.
* Rådgivning kring molnarkitektur (Azure, GCP eller AWS).
* Bidra till kompetensutveckling internt genom t.ex. workshops eller mentorroller.


**Vi Söker Dig Som**
* Har lång erfarenhet inom data & analytics och en stark teknisk grund inom moderna plattformar.
* Cirka 10 års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet, varav åtta år inom data och analytics – med fokus på arkitektur och lösningsdesign.
* Mycket god erfarenhet av Databricks och Python.
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD och arbete i Azure DevOps.
* Förståelse för skalbar, säker molnarkitektur – gärna i Azure.
* Flytande kunskaper i svenska och engelska både skriftligt och muntligt.


 Vi tror att du är självgående, nyfiken och van att jobba i konsultnära uppdrag där du både bygger och förklarar.
   

  

**Det Är Mycket Meriterande Om Du Har**
* Certifiering inom Databricks.
* Erfarenhet av verktyg som DBT, Airflow eller Spark.
* Vana att arbeta med analytics-verktyg och datamodellering.


**Vi erbjuder**
 Vi erbjuder dig en arbetsplats för professionell utveckling, meningsfulla projekt, en öppen kultur och en möjlighet för kompetensutveckling i ett spännande område där det konstant händer nya saker.
   

  

**Låter det intressant?**
 Är du redo att forma framtidens dataplattformar? Bifoga ditt CV eller din LinkedIn-profil så kontaktar vi dig. Intervjuer kommer att hållas löpande, så vi uppmuntrar dig att ansöka redan idag
   

  

 Jobbtyp: Heltid
   

  

 Stationeringsort: Stockholm/Solna
   

  

*Vi utför bakgrundskontroller av alla slutkandidater.*
*Tieto avböjer samtal från rekryteringsföretag.*
 Ytterligare information
   

  

 At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.
   

  

 Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)

title: Senior Backend Engineer with cloud experience
description:
Anyfin is building the next generation of consumer finance. We’re profitable, scaling quickly, and now operating with a banking license which opens up a lot of technical complexity.
   

  

 We’re looking for a senior backend engineer with cloud experience who enjoys moving fast, taking real ownership, and building things that actually have an impact.
   

  

 If that sounds like your kind of environment, keep reading. Because honestly, it’s not a role for everyone.
   

  

**Small team, high responsibility**
 We hire carefully. We’re not a company that grows by adding headcount everywhere, we grow by keeping the bar high and building a team where every person matters.
   

  

 This isn’t a place where you disappear into a big org. If you join, you’ll have real influence on what we build and how we build it.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Building, optimizing and scaling robust financial backend systems using Node.js and SQL (Postgres)
* Working primarily in the backend while contributing to our cloud infrastructure, helping design and operate systems across networking, servers and database architectures to support scalable and reliable services.
* Contributing to system architecture to ensure scalability, reliability, and long-term maintainability of financial systems.
* Collaborating closely with cross-functional teams to shape both product direction and business strategy.
* Sharing backend expertise with the team while promoting best practices, along with strong cloud and infrastructure competence.


 Our main stack is TypeScript, Node.js, React, React Native running on Google Cloud Platform.
   

  

**How We Think About Building**
 We’re pragmatic. We like speed, but we also care about building things that last.
   

  

 AI isn’t a side tool here. It’s embedded in how we work helping engineers move faster, reduce friction and focus on solving meaningful problems.
   

  

 We’re looking for engineers who are curious about that shift and want to be part of it, rather than people who feel like good engineering means doing everything the hard way.
   

  

 No ego. Just good judgment and high output.
   

  

**You’ll thrive here if you…**
* Have solid experience building backend systems with Node.js and working with cloud platforms such as GCP.
* Care about craftsmanship, performance, and reliability in the systems you build.
* Take responsibility naturally and don’t wait to be told what to do.
* Enjoy messy problems and figuring things out as you go.
* Like being in an ambitious and collaborative team.
* Want to build and improve products, not just maintain.


**You’re Comfortable With Things Like**
* Strong background in backend development with Node.js and SQL databases (preferably Postgres).
* Experience in designing, deploying and monitoring solutions on major cloud platforms such as GCP, AWS or Azure.
* At least 5 years of professional experience, ideally in high-stakes environments like finance.
* Passionate about solving complex backend problems with clean, pragmatic solutions.
* Solid understanding of system design and architecture.
* Bonus if you’ve worked with React, Python, Go, GraphQL, Kubernetes or DevOps with Github Actions.


**A few practical notes**
* Stockholm based.
* EU work authorization required.


**Why Anyfin?**
 Because this is one of those moments where a company is about to level up: Banking license secured, expansion ahead and a lot to build.
   

  

 If you want to be part of a small, high-trust team doing meaningful work, we’d love to hear from you. Apply only if you want the responsibility that comes with real impact.
   

  

 Anyfin is a fintech on a mission to simplify loan repayments and improve the financial well-being of millions. We help consumers reduce the costs of high-interest loans, and take control of their repayment plan.

title: Testare till TakeCare
description:
Vill du bidra till att förenkla och förbättra för vården? Vi söker nu en nyfiken testare som brinner för kvalitetssäkring och som vill vara med och utveckla TakeCare – ett av Sveriges största vårdinformationssystem. Systemet används av över 70 000 samtidiga användare och CGM har ansvaret för ca 250 vårdgivares installationer.
   

  

**Din roll hos oss**
 Som testare hos CGM kommer du att spela en nyckelroll i att säkra kvaliteten på TakeCare. Du ansvarar för att planera, utforma och utföra tester samt skapa testfall och testdata utifrån krav.
   

  

 Du arbetar i ett team om 5–7 kollegor bestående av systemutvecklare, produktägare och verksamhetsspecialister. Tillsammans arbetar ni nära under hela utvecklingsprocessen.
   

  

**Exempel På Arbetsuppgifter**
* Tolka krav och validera testbarhet
* Skapa testfall och testdata samt planera testfaser
* Utföra regressionstester och utforskande tester
* Samarbeta med utvecklare och produktägare för att säkra kvalitet
* Vara med och driva arbetet med testautomatisering inom olika områden


 Hos oss är kundens och patientens behov alltid i fokus, och du kommer att arbeta med komplexa system som ställer höga krav på säkerhet och prestanda.
   

  

**Om dig**
 Vi söker dig som är nyfiken, analytisk och strukturerad, med stor erfarenhet av testning och en god förståelse för systemutveckling. Som testare hos oss förväntas du kontinuerligt granska och utmana våra arbetssätt – vad kan förbättras och hur? Har du dessutom erfarenhet av testautomatisering ser vi det som mycket meriterande. Vi verkar inom MedTech-industrin, och erfarenhet från denna sektor är därför ett stort plus.
   

  

**Kvalifikationer**
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet som testare
* Utbildning inom testning; exempelvis ISTQB, Effektiv Testmetodik eller motsvarande
* Erfarenhet av verktyg såsom Jira och Postman/Insomnia
* Erfarenhet kring testautomatiseringsverktyg för GUI såsom Playwright, Selenium eller Cypress
* God kommunikationsförmåga på både svenska och engelska


**Meriterande, Men Inget Krav**
* Relevant högskoleutbildning
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med komplexa system med höga krav på säkerhet och prestanda
* Testautomatiseringsverktyg för GUI för Windowsbaserade applikationer


**Vi erbjuder**
 Hos Oss Får Du Möjlighet Att Jobba Tillsammans Med Ett Engagerat Team Där Alla Arbetar Mot Samma Mål – Att Bidra Till En Bättre Och Mer Effektiv Vård. Vi Erbjuder Dig
   

  

* Komplexa och utmanande arbetsuppgifter
* En arbetsplats i ljusa och moderna lokaler i Solna
* Hybrid-upplägg med möjlighet till distansarbete två dagar i veckan
* Generöst friskvårdsbidrag och en friskvårdstimme i veckan
* Tillsvidareanställning, heltid, som inleds med 6 månaders provanställning
* Kollektivavtal


**Ansökan**
 Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, så skicka in din ansökan så snart som möjligt. Tillträde sker enligt överenskommelse. Om du har frågor om tjänsten eller rekryteringsprocessen är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterare Karin Bogren på karin.bogren@partner.cgm.com.
   

  

**Vår rekryteringsprocess**
 Första steget är ett kortare videosamtal med vår rekryterare där vi berättar mer om tjänsten och lär känna dig bättre. Därefter följer ett praktiskt test samt intervjuer med din framtida chef och kollegor.
   

  

 Om du går vidare till slutskedet av processen kommer vi att be om referenser samt genomföra en bakgrundskontroll innan vi erbjuder dig en anställning.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot att lära känna dig!
   

  

*CGMs vision ”Synchronizing healthcare” genomsyrar allt vårt arbete. Vi är marknadsledande leverantör av IT-lösningar och kommunikationstjänster inom hälso- och sjukvård, social omsorg, företagshälsovård, barn – och elevhälsovård samt kliniska laboratorium i Sverige. Vår drivkraft är att göra nytta för patienten via våra e-hälsolösningar. Behovet av nya lösningar är under ständig utveckling, vilket ställer höga krav på oss som leverantör. Tillsammans med våra kunder är vi starkt engagerade i att förverkliga Sveriges e-hälsovision om att bli bäst i världen på att använda digitaliseringens och e-hälsans möjligheter.*

title: .Net Application Support
description:
**K&K Talents** 
 is an international recruiting agency that has been providing technical resources in the European region since 1993. This position is with one of our clients in
 **Sweden** 
 who is actively hiring candidates to expand their teams.
 



  





**Position : .NET Application Support Engineer** 




**Location : Stockholm, Sweden(Hybrid)** 




**Type : Permanent Role** 









**Key Responsibilities** 




 Provide Level 2 and Level 3 support for .NET based applications in production environments
 



 Diagnose and resolve complex application, performance, and integration issues
 



 Perform root cause analysis (RCA) and implement permanent fixes
 



 Handle major incidents, outages, and escalations with timely resolution
 



 Monitor application health, logs, and alerts to ensure system stability
 



 Technical Troubleshooting
 



 Debug issues involving C#, ASP.NET, ASP.NET MVC/Core, Web APIs
 



 Analyse application logs, IIS logs, Windows Event Viewer, and custom logs
 



 Troubleshoot issues related to SQL Server (queries, performance, deadlocks, indexing)
 



 Support integrations with third party services, APIs, and message queues
 



 Production & Release Support
 



 Support deployments, hotfixes, patches, and releases in production
 



 Coordinate with DevOps teams for CI/CD pipeline execution
 



 Ensure rollback plans, post deployment validation, and monitoring
 



 Performance & Reliability
 



 Identify and resolve performance bottlenecks in applications and databases
 



 Support application scalability, availability, and resiliency
 



 Perform proactive maintenance and preventive fixes
 



 Collaboration & Documentation
 



 Work closely with development, QA, infrastructure, and business teams
 



 Create and maintain support documentation, SOPs, KBs, and runbooks
 



 Participate in on call rotations and out of hours support (as required)
 



  





**Required Technical Skills** 




 Strong experience in C#, .NET Framework, .NET Core
 



 ASP.NET, ASP.NET MVC, Web APIs
 



 SQL Server (T SQL, performance tuning, execution plans)
 



 Application & Infrastructure
 



 IIS, Windows Server
 



 REST/SOAP web services
 



 Familiarity with Azure or AWS (App Services, VMs, monitoring – preferred)
 



 Logging & monitoring tools (App Insights, Splunk, ELK, etc.)
 



 DevOps & Tools
 



 CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, Jenkins – any)
 



 Source control: Git
 



 Ticketing tools: ServiceNow(or equivalent), JIRA, Azure DevOps
 



  





**Note: Applicants for employment in Sweden should possess work authorization which does not require sponsorship by the employer for a visa.**

title: Engineering Manager – Tech Trading FX | SEB, Solna
description:
SEB is more than just a bank with a technology function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fueled by collaboration. From COBOL to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we're innovating for a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone.


We are looking for an Engineering Manager to join Tech Trading FX/MM and help drive our accelerated FX agenda. Our department is part of Technology Trading and consists of around 60 professionals delivering development and maintenance for FX trading. We operate in a fast-paced environment where time-to-market, stability, and quality are critical to business success.


**About the role**



As an Engineering Manager, you will lead a team with approximately 12 employees within Tech Trading FX, combining leadership, technology, and business understanding.



You will:


* Drive the technical agenda and roadmap in close collaboration with the Tech Lead and Product Owner
* Coach and develop engineers, strengthening both technical excellence and team performance
* Work closely with business stakeholders to ensure alignment between solutions and client needs


A key part of the role is to actively drive the adoption of modern technologies including cloud-native solutions, automation, and AI.



You are expected to:


* Identify opportunities where modern technologies create business value
* Encourage experimentation, curiosity and learning in the team
* Lead the evolution of ways of working, tools, and engineering practices


You report to the Department Manager and are an active member of the management team.


**Who you are**



You are an experienced leader with a strong technical background, ideally having worked as an Engineering Manager with direct reports or in a similar leadership position for several years.



You combine:


* A hands-on understanding of modern software development
* Leadership experience with a focus on coaching and empowerment
* A strong interest in financial markets (FX knowledge is a merit)
* You are curious, forward leaning, and comfortable operating in a changing environment. More importantly, you actively drive change.


We believe you:


* Have a strong interest in modern technologies, agentic engineering, and AI.
* Inspire your team to explore, experiment, and adopt new ways of working
* See continuous learning and innovation as a natural part of building a high-performing team
* Are fluent in English and have strong communication skills


As a leader, you:


* Build trust and strong relationships with stakeholders
* Take accountability and drive initiatives forward
* Create an environment where people grow, contribute, and perform at their best


**Why this role matters**



This is not a traditional management role. You will play a key role in shaping how modern engineering, AI, and automation are applied within FX both at team level and across the department. If you are motivated by combining leadership, technology, and transformation, this is an opportunity to make a real impact.


**As part of the application, you must explicitly describe:**


* Your experience in driving AI adoption and modern engineering practices to create business value
* Your role in leading or contributing to technology transformation and evolving ways of working
* Your ability to build a culture of experimentation, learning, and innovation within teams


This is a prerequisite for the application being processed.



**Do you want to be part of SEB?**



It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.



Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 2026-06-11. If you have questions about the position, please contact Talent Acquisition Partner Linn Odén at linn.oden@seb.se, note that we will not process applications via email.



Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.



SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, which means that this position might be covered by internal redeployment.



Learn more about working at SEB on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.



sebgroup.com/career



bit.ly/SEBcareer



.
company_description: More than 15.000 people work at SEB. Working in SEB means being part of an exciting journey, driven by digital transformation

title: Business Development Representative
description:
locations
Stockholm (Flexible)
time type
Full time
posted on
Posted Today
job requisition id
JR111387
Genesys empowers organizations of all sizes to improve loyalty and business outcomes by creating the best experiences for their customers and employees. Through Genesys Cloud, the AI-powered Experience Orchestration platform, organizations can accelerate growth by delivering empathetic, personalized experiences at scale to drive customer loyalty, workforce engagement, efficiency and operational improvements.


We employ more than 6,000 people across the globe who embrace empathy and cultivate collaboration to succeed. And, while we offer great benefits and perks like larger tech companies, our employees have the independence to make a larger impact on the company and take ownership of their work. Join the team and create the future of customer experience together.

**Business Development Representative – Sweden**

**Department:** Sales Development – EMEA  

**Location:** Sweden  

**Reports to:** BDR Manager – EMEA

**Role Overview**


We are seeking a commercially driven **Business Development Representative (BDR)** to support pipeline growth across the **Swedish market**.


This role is responsible for generating pipeline through a combination of **inbound and outbound activities**, engaging enterprise and mid-market accounts, and partnering closely with Account Executives and cross-functional teams to support revenue growth.


We are looking for a **mature and motivated sales professional** with **2–3 years of experience** who is confident engaging stakeholders, takes ownership of their pipeline, and is eager to develop a long-term career in enterprise SaaS sales.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Generate pipeline across Sweden through a combination of **outbound prospecting and inbound lead follow-up**
* Identify, research, and engage prospective customers across enterprise and mid-market accounts
* Qualify marketing-generated leads into high-quality sales opportunities
* Partner with **Account Executives** to support account research, outreach strategies, and territory development
* Collaborate with **Marketing** on campaigns, regional events, and follow-up execution
* Work cross-functionally with Sales, Customer Success, Alliances, and Channel teams to identify new opportunities
* Communicate the value of Genesys’ cloud and AI-driven CX solutions aligned to customer business challenges
* Maintain accurate activity tracking, pipeline updates, and reporting in Salesforce
* Consistently meet and exceed KPIs related to meetings booked, pipeline generated, and opportunity conversion

**Skills & Qualifications**

* **2–3 years of experience** in a BDR, SDR, or sales-related role within SaaS, CX, cloud, or technology environments
* **Fluent-level Swedish and professional English language skills required**
* **Additional Nordic language skills (Danish, Norwegian, Finnish, or Icelandic) are highly advantageous**
* Experience working within the Swedish business market and culture is highly desirable
* Demonstrated ability to generate pipeline through outbound prospecting
* Strong communication and stakeholder engagement skills
* Mature, professional, and commercially aware mindset
* Strong organizational and time-management skills
* Experience using Salesforce, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, or similar sales engagement tools preferred
* Collaborative approach with the ability to work effectively across multiple teams

**Why Join Genesys?**

* Join a global leader in AI-driven customer experience technology
* Build your career within a high-performing EMEA sales organization
* Competitive compensation with performance-based incentives
* Clear progression opportunities into Senior BDR and Account Executive roles
* Collaborative, inclusive, and results-driven team environment


If a Genesys employee referred you, please use the link they sent you to apply.

**About Genesys:**


Genesys® empowers more than 8,000 organizations worldwide to create the best customer and employee experiences. With agentic AI at its core, Genesys Cloud™ is the AI-Powered Experience Orchestration platform that connects people, systems, data and AI across the enterprise. As a result, organizations can drive customer loyalty, growth and retention while increasing operational efficiency and teamwork across human and AI workforces. To learn more, visit www.genesys.com.

**Reasonable Accommodations:**


If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are limited in your ability to access or use this online application and need an alternative method for applying, you or someone you know may contact us at reasonable.accommodations@genesys.com.


You can expect a response within 24–48 hours. To help us provide the best support, click the email link above to open a pre-filled message and complete the requested information before sending. If you have any questions, please include them in your email.


This email is intended to support job seekers requesting accommodations. Messages unrelated to accommodation—such as application follow-ups or resume submissions—may not receive a response.

**Genesys is an equal opportunity employer committed to fairness in the workplace. We evaluate qualified applicants without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or** **expression, marital** **status, domestic partner** **status, national** **origin, genetics,** **disability, military** **and veteran status, and other protected characteristics.**

*Please note that recruiters will never ask for sensitive personal or financial information during the application phase.*

title: Senior Cloud Arkitekt
description:
På Sogeti tror vi att det bästa finns inuti var och en av oss. Oavsett om du befinner dig i början av din karriär, eller redan är en väletablerad expert, så kommer vi att uppmuntra dig att fortsätta utvecklas och bli ännu bättre, kommer vi att uppmuntra dig att nå din fulla potential och bli bättre. Genom vår gemensamma passion för teknik, vår entreprenöriella kultur och vårt fokus på kontinuerligt lärande, kommer vi att ge dig allt du behöver för att göra ditt bästa arbete och bli den bästa versionen av dig själv.


**Senior Cloud Arkitekt**
-------------------------


**Om rollen**


Vi står inför en otroligt spännande fas! Nu söker vi en driven och passionerad Cloud Arkitekt (SME) som vill vara med och bygga framtidens agila team och utveckla regionens mest spännande kunder. Som Microsoft Gold Partner och med vår regions kraftiga tillväxt på området gör vi en stor satsning på att hjälpa våra kunder på deras resa med Microsoft-teknologi.


Vi erbjuder dig en central roll där du får vara med och driva kunders molnresa framåt, från strategi till implementation. För att lyckas i rollen kommer du att få stöd och mentorskap från vårt nationella Portfolio-team, ett tight nätverk av experter som hjälper dig att leverera på topp.


Denna roll ger dig även möjligheten att jobba med en globalt erkänd stor kund och vara en del av deras transformation. Du ges utrymme att växa i en dynamisk miljö med Microsofts senaste teknologier och verktyg.

  

*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:*


* Driva kunders molnresa framåt, från strategi till implementation.
* Arbeta med konkreta case hos våra kunder som är pågående och under uppstart.
* Bygga ett agilt team som arbetar med många av regionens mest intressanta kunder.
* Skapa långsiktiga kundrelationer och vara en nyckelspelare i regionens utveckling.
  

**Din profil**


* Subject Matter Expert (SME) med en stark teknisk bakgrund inom molntjänster, särskilt inom Microsoft Azure.
* Erfarenhet av att leda projekt och driva framgångsrika molnmigreringar.
* Trivs med att arbeta i ett agilt team och har en passion för att bygga långsiktiga lösningar.
* Kommunikativ, affärsmässig och har förmågan att anpassa tekniska lösningar till kundens specifika behov.
* Vill vara en central person i vår regions tillväxt och skapa långvariga kundrelationer.
* Kan uttrycka sig flytande i svenska (tal & skrift) samt god kunskap i engelska
  

**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas**


* Innovativ miljö: Hos oss får du chansen att jobba med den senaste tekniken och vara en del av ett dynamiskt team som älskar att skapa värde genom innovation.
* Karriärutveckling: Vi bryr oss om din framtid och erbjuder utvecklingsprogram och certifieringar i de senaste teknologierna, så att du kan växa och bli den bästa versionen av dig själv.
* Flexibelt arbete: Vi förstår att livet är mer än bara jobb. Därför erbjuder vi möjligheter till distansarbete och flexibla arbetstider för att du ska må bra och trivas.
* Teamkänsla: Vi är som en stor familj med en härlig teamkänsla. Genom att leva efter våra värdeord som mod, passion, laganda och entreprenörskap - skapar vi en arbetsmiljö där alla kan trivas.
  

**Ansökan**


Vi välkomnar varmt din ansökan idag, urvalet sker löpande! Om du har frågor om tjänsten eller rekryteringsprocessen, vänligen kontakta TA Partner Stina Degerfeldt, stina.degerfeldt@sogeti.se


Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov.


Sogeti Sverige, en del av Capgemini Group, med 19 kontor och 1200 medarbetare, gör teknologi enkelt och värdeskapande. Vi är specialiserade på AI-drivna lösningar inom quality engineering & testing, data och cloud och förvandlar snabbt idéer till handling. Sogeti levererar konkreta resultat, hjälper organisationer att innovera med självförtroende och skapar värde från dag ett. Vi är agila, snabbrörliga och drar nytta av starka partnerskap. Våra lokala team arbetar sida vid sida med våra kunder och bygger nära relationer genom att förstå deras verklighet. Tillsammans med Capgemini-koncernens globala styrka och branschexpertis skapar vi skalbara resultat.
  

Right here. Right now. | www.sogeti.se
company_description: Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value.

title: Senior Customer Manager - Tieto Banktech (m/f/d)
description:
Solna, Sweden


* Full-time
* Sales and Business Development
* Hybrid
* Tieto Banktech

  
Job Description  

We are looking for a Senior Customer Manager for Card Personalization services who wants to be part of Tieto Banktech. Tieto Banktech powers some of the Nordics’ most trusted banking systems with secure, reliable, and scalable solutions. Using automation, data, AI, and cloud, supported by hands-on guidance, we help banks modernize their core, strengthen trust, and deliver greater impact across the banking experience.

  

  

Card Personalization unit helps banks and fintechs to issue physical payment cards. We are a market leader in the Nordic - Baltic region and look to expand in Europe. Our services cover the whole value chain of card issuance, starting from the design and material selection, followed by the manufacturing by one of our European or Global partners, then personalizing cards in one of our own personalization sites in the region, and finally packing and delivering final product to cardholders around the world.

  



**When joining Tieto Banktech as a Senior Customer Manager, you will:**

* Join a skilled and experienced international team of cards and personalization experts, where you learn new things with your colleagues.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with customers and stakeholders. Act as a trusted advisor to customers, understanding their needs and providing tailored solutions to meet their requirements.
* Identify and pursue new business opportunities in target markets. Develop a robust sales pipeline, negotiate and close deals, and ensure the achievement of targets.
* Work closely with internal teams, including marketing, product development, and customer service, to ensure alignment and support for sales initiatives.
* Represent the company at selected industry events. Contribute to company’s initiatives by sharing insights and expertise on market trends and best practices.

 **Who we are looking for someone with:**

* Proven experience in customer management, international sales and relationship building in financial sector or related services, preferably in cards and payments area.
* Strong background in solution and service sales with bright technology acumen.
* Strategic thinking and customer engagement skills.
* Hands-on operational experience with a deep understanding of the market.
* Demonstrable and successful track-record of managing sales and customer relationships.
* High level presentation skills with the ability to gain credibility and trust with a variety of technical and non-technical stakeholders and influencers within the customer organizations.
* You are fluent in Swedish and English, both verbally and in writing.

 **We offer**


We offer you professional growth, meaningful projects, open culture, and an outstanding work-life balance! We offer you an opportunity to create the future of a growing, fast-developing, and important sector. We believe that our organizational culture is an important part of enabling you to be successful. We provide a flexible hybrid work model as part of our culture and way of working. Finally, we also believe in curiosity and learning as a lifestyle where you need to unlearn and relearn every day as new possibilities emerge.

 **Did we get you inspired?**


We look forward to your application!  

Interviews will be held continuously, so we encourage you to apply today! For more information or questions, please contact Talent Acquisition team recruitmentinbanking@tieto.com

  



*Please note that interview screening process will start mid August.*

  

Hope to hear from you soon!

  



**Location: Solna / Sweden**

 *We perform background checks on all final candidates.*

*Tieto declines calls from recruitment companies.*

  

Additional Information  

At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.


Diversity, equity and inclusion | Sustainability | Tieto


  
We provide customers across different industries with mission-critical solutions through our specialized software businesses Tieto Caretech, Tieto Banktech and Tieto Indtech as well as Tieto Tech Consulting business.


Our around 14 000 talented vertical software, design, cloud and AI experts are dedicated to empowering our customers to succeed and innovate with latest technology.


Tieto’s annual revenue is approximately EUR 2 billion. The company’s shares are listed on the NASDAQ exchange in Helsinki and Stockholm, as well as on Oslo Børs.
