title: Android Platform Engineer
description:
Do you want to help develop the next generation of connected products and digital platforms?  

Sigma Embedded Engineering is now looking for experienced Android Platform Engineers to join us in creating smart, connected, and sustainable solutions together with our clients.

**About the role**


As an Android Platform Engineer, you will work closely with our clients to develop and adapt Android at the system level. You will be involved end-to-end – from architecture and design to implementation and optimization of advanced embedded solutions.


You will work in technology-intensive projects where quality, performance, and scalability are key. Assignments range from infotainment systems and automotive solutions to industrial applications and IoT.

**Your responsibilities**

* Customize and develop the Android platform (AOSP)
* Work with HAL, Linux kernel, and system integration
* Drive architecture and design decisions together with team and client
* Troubleshoot and optimize performance across the full stack
* Ensure high quality through testing and code reviews
* Collaborate in cross-functional teams in agile environments

**We believe you have**

* At least three years of experience in Android platform development (AOSP)
* Strong skills in C/C++ and/or Java/Kotlin
* Experience with Linux and embedded development
* Knowledge of system architecture and software design
* Experience with tools such as Git, Gerrit, and CI/CD
* Fluency in English (Swedish is a plus)

**Meritorious experience**

* Experience from automotive or safety-critical systems
* Knowledge of BSP, drivers, or kernel development
* Experience with performance analysis and optimization
* Experience with cloud or IoT integration

**Preferred additional skills, personal traits and experience**


Curious and driven by technology, you are eager to learn and continuously grow within Android and embedded systems. You are a collaborative and communicative team player who takes ownership, works proactively, and builds strong relationships with colleagues and clients.

**We offer**


At Sigma Embedded Engineering, we believe in you and that together we can create the most exciting opportunities by building the workplace and environment we want to work in. Together, we also find assignments where you thrive and grow. We have assignments in everything from self-driving cars (ADAS), application development, Medtech, Active Safety, IoT, Machine Learning, Cybersecurity, 5G, and algorithm development.

**Who are we?**  

We love doing things together and strive for a good balance between work and leisure. This could be after-work hangouts, events, sports activities, ski trips, or inspirational talks. We've been on many fun trips together, which have been fantastic, and something we want to continue doing.


Skills development has always been important to us, and in addition to growth opportunities within your consulting assignments and various technical trainings, we also have internal programs for personal development.

**We are part of the Sigma Group**  

As part of the Sigma Group, we offer the best of both worlds: stability and entrepreneurial spirit. Sigma consists of several companies within different technical competence areas and currently has over 5,000 employees and operations in many countries. This makes us Sweden’s largest privately-owned consulting group.

title: Service Delivery Manager
description:
**Location:** Stockholm / Nordics - hybrid

**Team:** Group Infrastructure & IT Security

**Reports to:** Head of Infrastructure & IT Security (Group CTO)

##### **About Newsec**

Newsec is the largest commercial property services company in Northern Europe, operating across the Nordics and Baltics. Our Group IT function keeps the digital backbone of our business secure, reliable, and ready for what's next. As we mature our security operations and identity landscape, we're looking for a hands-on specialist who can bring structure, automation, and governance to two of the most critical areas in modern IT.


##### **The Role**

This is a dual-focused role at the intersection of operational security and identity governance. You will be responsible for making sure that the security controls protecting our infrastructure actually work in practice and that the people inside Newsec have the right access, at the right time, for the right reasons.


You will work closely with our vendors, internal IT managers across the Group, HR, CISO and the wider security and infrastructure teams. The role is both strategic and operational: you will help establish working methods and support day-to-day execution.


You will also play an important role in interpreting internal steering documents, policies, and governance principles within IT security, and turning them into clear operational requirements for vendors, IT managers, and internal teams. This includes helping the organization understand what the governing direction means in practice, how it should influence priorities and decisions, and how it should be reflected in day-to-day security operations and delivery.


###### **Operational Security (Service Delivery Management)**

* Govern and continuously develop our Microsoft Purview environment — data classification, DLP, information protection and compliance controls.
* Coordinate vulnerability management activities: scanning cycles, prioritization, remediation tracking with vendors and IT managers.
* Drive our CSAT (Cybersecurity Assessment) program and translate findings into actionable improvements.
* Plan and coordinate penetration testing activities with external partners and internal stakeholders.
* Ensure security operations are correctly executed across our IT infrastructure areas — endpoint, network, cloud, and on-prem.
* Act as the bridge between our security strategy and the vendors and internal IT teams who deliver day-to-day operations.
* Collaborate closely with our SOC partner to monitor, investigate, and escalate security events, and continuously improve detection and response capabilities.
* Support and coordinate incident response activities, ensuring effective handling, communication, and follow-up of security incidents across internal teams and external partners.
* Support the development of cybersecurity awareness and training initiatives for employees together with the CISO.

###### **Identity Governance & Administration (IGA)**

* Take ownership of our Entra ID governance and identity lifecycle.
* Coordinate initiatives to establish robust Joiner-Mover-Leaver (JML) processes, with HR systems as the authoritative source.
* Drive automation of access provisioning, role assignments and de-provisioning across Newsec's application landscape.
* Help define and operationalize access reviews, entitlement management and least-privilege principles.
* Partner with HR, business units, and application owners to make identity work for people, not against them.

##### **Who we're looking for**

We know the combination above is broad. You won't be a perfect match on day one — nobody is. What we care about is:


* Solid experience in a senior specialist role within service delivery, security operations, or a similar function in an enterprise IT environment.
* Hands-on familiarity with the Microsoft security stack — Purview, Defender and Entra ID in particular.
* Experience coordinating with external vendors for security services (vulnerability scanning, pentests, MDR/SOC, etc.).
* Understanding of identity lifecycle management and how HR-driven JML processes should work in practice.
* A pragmatic, governance-minded approach: you like structure, but you ship.
* Strong communication skills in English, Swedish or another Nordic language is a plus.

###### **Bonus points for**

* Direct experience with IGA tooling and Entra ID Governance (Access Reviews, Entitlement Management, Lifecycle Workflows).
* Background in vulnerability management programs or CSAT-style assessments.
* Experience integrating HRM systems (e.g., SAP SuccessFactors, Workday, or similar) with identity platforms.
* Relevant certifications (SC-100, SC-300, CISSP, ITIL).

##### **Why this role is interesting**

You’ll have a strong opportunity to influence how Newsec works with security and identity at Group level. The two areas are intentionally combined because we believe good security starts with knowing who has access to what, and we want one person supporting that work end-to-end through expertise, structure, and coordination.


##### **What we offer**

* A senior position with broad scope and direct executive visibility.
* A collaborative Group IT environment across the Nordics.
* Flexible hybrid working.
* Competitive compensation and benefits.
* The chance to build, not just maintain.

title: Senior Product Manager
description:
We are currently recruiting a **Senior Product Manager** to join our team, responsible for the revenue and growth of their products and services, as we look to support the business strategy to focus on key products into target market segments. This role offers hybrid (remote/office mix) working and is based from our offices in **Malmo (Hyllie).**

**What will you be doing in this role?**


The Senior Product Manager is responsible for the Nordic Product team, you will drive the product strategy, define market requirements, and commission the development and go-to-market execution of hardware, peripherals, and related services for Telecare markets across the Nordics. You will oversee the Nordic product portfolio core devices throughout their lifecycle—from ideation and concept development to launch, market rollout, and operations —ensuring successful deployment and operations in collaboration with regional product team. Your expertise will be critical in delivering innovative, market-ready solutions that meet customer needs and business objectives.

**The Ideal candidate:**


You will have proven experience in product management of tech products, with excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, able to influence effectively. You will be an adaptable, proactive, team player, used to leading a team and taking responsibility for your products with a track record of delivering results. To be successful in this role you will be highly customer focused, performance driven and able to work in an international set up.


This role will require some travel, including international travel.

**What we offer:**

* Collective agreement
* Service pension
* Health care allowance
* Hybrid working
* A warm and welcoming team environment
* Development and the chance to build a rewarding career
* Modern office in Hyllie, Malmö
* Exciting products and services in a growing industry

**The Senior Product Manager is responsible for**


The Senior Product Manager owns the Nordic product portfolio and is responsible for defining and executing the product strategy across the product lifecycle. This includes monitoring market trends, competitor activity, and emerging technologies, while ensuring the portfolio remains aligned with customer needs and business objectives. Acting as a subject matter expert, the role drives product positioning, evaluates new opportunities, and supports management in assessing technologies that enhance customer value.


Working closely with regional stakeholders, delivery teams, and Product Owners, the Senior Product Manager translates market requirements into clear product roadmaps and development priorities. The role is responsible for building business cases, managing the product backlog, prioritising initiatives based on business value, and ensuring solutions are successfully developed, tested, launched, and adopted in the market.


The Senior Product Manager continuously evaluates portfolio performance, identifies opportunities for growth and innovation, and oversees product lifecycle activities, including product enhancements and end-of-life transitions. The role also supports commercial activities by translating customer and tender requirements into clear technical specifications that enable accurate and competitive solution proposals.


As leader of the Nordic Product Office, the Senior Product Manager is responsible for developing and leading a high-performing team, including recruitment, performance management, employee development, and compensation. Through strong cross-functional collaboration, the role ensures alignment across business, commercial, technical, and operational teams to deliver successful product outcomes.

**Key skills and experience:**


Essential:

* Ownership & Accountability: A proactive, results-driven individual who takes responsibility for deliverables, deadlines, and outcomes.
* Education: Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Business, Science, or a related field.
* Experience: demonstrable Product Management experience, preferably in a hardware or technical product development environment.
* Strong understanding of hardware product lifecycles, including embedded devices, solutions, certification processes, supply chain considerations, and product compliance requirements.
* Knowledge of relevant healthcare, and welfare technology regulations, including, GDPR, NIS2, cybersecurity requirements, and national regulatory frameworks across the Nordic markets.
* Experience driving product compliance and governance, ensuring products and services meet applicable legal, security, privacy, quality, and regulatory standards throughout the product lifecycle.
* Ability to translate regulatory and compliance requirements into product strategy and development priorities, balancing customer needs, innovation, risk management, and commercial objectives.
* Familiarity with Telecare concepts and the broader healthcare/assistive technology sector. o Proven track record in integrating AI and data-driven thinking into product development.
* Experience working in multicultural, multinational teams with cross-functional collaboration.
* Skills: o Strong influencing and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to engage at all organizational levels.
* Excellent written and verbal communication, with the ability to articulate complex ideas clearly. o Proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook).
* Agile/SAFe familiarity – experience in backlog management, roadmap development, and feature prioritization.
* Market analysis expertise – ability to assess trends, customer needs, and competitive landscapes.
* Mindset: o Customer-focused, performance-driven, and committed to delivering high-quality results. Adaptable, resilient, and able to thrive in a dynamic, evolving market. o Self-motivated, able to act on initiative and manage priorities effectively. Desirable Qualifications:
* Knowledge of cloud-based services, app development, or IoT integrations.
* Experience as an Agile Product Owner (SAFe).
* Advanced technical degree (e.g., MSc, MBA) or certifications in Product Management

title: Group Legal Counsel Data and Privacy
description:
**Join our Team**
-----------------

 **About this opportunity**  

Group Privacy & Data Legal Affairs & Compliance partners with the Group Data Office and business stakeholders to provide legal advice on data and to develop and maintain Ericsson’s global Privacy Framework.  

We are now looking for an experienced lawyer who will focus on interpreting and operationalizing data and privacy regulations globally, across multiple jurisdictions and on behalf of a multinational organization. Your work will help enable compliant, trustworthy and innovative use of data and AI within Ericsson’s services and operations.

 **What you will do**  

You will be part of Group Privacy & Data Legal Affairs, working closely with the Data & AI Office, Privacy Advisors, Legal Counsels, Security Managers, Product and Solution units, and Government and Industry Relations.


Your main responsibilities include:  

* Acting as a subject matter expert on complex privacy and data topics and translating relevant regulations and industry standards into internal policies, guidance, tools, best practices and metrics within our Privacy Framework.
* Supporting stakeholders by developing templates, standards, working tools and training to build awareness of privacy, data and digitalization-related regulations, including the AI Act, Data Act and other data and AI regulations.
* Providing legal advice on privacy, information security and related data matters for cross-functional projects, products and solutions, new business opportunities and other initiatives, to ensure that privacy and data management requirements are adequately implemented across Ericsson.
* Advising on topics such as data analytics, cloud, IoT, SaaS and other technologies, and identifying relevant emerging issues and trends.
* Providing updates to management, security, compliance and other stakeholders regarding new and updated legal and regulatory requirements in the areas of privacy, data and digitalization.
* Contributing to the strategic direction of the privacy program by gathering business and compliance input and assessing outcomes.
 **The skills you bring**  

* Minimum 10 years’ experience as a business lawyer, including at least 4 years with a primary focus on privacy and data.
* Experience applying privacy and data regulations across multiple jurisdictions and advising a multinational company or supporting a global business (not limited to a single market or jurisdiction).
* Experience with privacy and data-related regulations, preferably in the telecom industry, and a strong interest in global privacy and data management programs.
* International experience.
* Strong ability to independently handle and manage legal matters, and to prioritize among multiple stakeholders in a fast-paced environment.
* Strong analytical, communication and networking skills, with the ability to work effectively with internal and external counterparts.
* Independent, goal-oriented and systematic way of working, combined with being a collaborative and driven team player who can initiate and drive change.
* Strong knowledge and interest in emerging technologies, including AI and data-driven solutions.
* Good business understanding.
* Fluent in English; an additional language is an advantage.
* High level of integrity and professionalism.
**Application**  

We look forward to your application with CV in English. Please note that we do not accept, proceed, or respond for applications sent via e-mail. We target 60% work-from-the office.  

Last day to apply: 26th of June, 2026  

If you have specific questions, you are welcome to contact Chief Privacy Officer, Helena Eriksvik at helena.eriksvik@ericsson.com or Raheleh Rouhani, Sr. Talent Acquisition Partner at raheleh.rouhani@ericsson.com  

Location: Stockholm, Sweden or Reading, UK.

 **Why join Ericsson?**At Ericsson, you´ll have an outstanding opportunity. The chance to use your skills and imagination to push the boundaries of what´s possible. To build solutions never seen before to some of the world’s toughest problems. You´ll be challenged, but you won’t be alone. You´ll be joining a team of diverse innovators, all driven to go beyond the status quo to craft what comes next.  

  

**What happens once you apply?**Click Here to find all you need to know about what our typical hiring process looks like.Encouraging a diverse and inclusive organization is core to our values at Ericsson, that's why we champion it in everything we do. We truly believe that by collaborating with people with different experiences we drive innovation, which is essential for our future growth. We encourage people from all backgrounds to apply and realize their full potential as part of our Ericsson team. Ericsson is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. learn more.

 **Primary country and city:** Sweden (SE) || Stockholm

title: Head of Business Technology
description:
**Location:** Oslo, Norway or Stockholm, Sweden (occasional travel)
  

**Reports to:** COO

**About Nofence**
-----------------


Nofence built the world's first virtual fencing solution for livestock. We're a Norwegian scale-up on a mission to make grazing radically simpler and more sustainable for farmers everywhere, and we're growing fast. To scale well, we need the systems, data, and infrastructure underneath the company to be as good as the product on the animal's neck. That's where you come in.

**The role**
------------


This is a build role, not a caretaker role. We're hiring for execution.


Your first and most important mission is to implement a new ERP and a new e-commerce platform, fast and clean. The strategic groundwork is done and we have a clear view of where we're headed, so this is about delivery, not another long evaluation. These platforms are the foundation our next phase of growth runs on, and speed matters. You'll then own the wider business technology function: the internal systems, data, and infrastructure that let every team at Nofence move faster.


You won't do this alone. You'll work hand in hand with our commercial team and the infrastructure engineers in our tech organization to make it happen. Your job is to rally those people around a goal and get it across the line.


You'll combine strategy with real hands-on delivery. At our size, that means you're still in the room for the implementation, not just the steering committee. You set the direction, and you also make it happen.


You'll own the business technology roadmap, budget, and delivery, and you'll make sure every investment is cost-effective, secure, and tied to a clear business outcome.

**What you'll own first (the next 12 months)**
----------------------------------------------

* **ERP.** Implement a new ERP on an aggressive timeline with minimal disruption to the business. The direction is set; your job is to make it real.
* **E-commerce.** Stand up a new e-commerce solution that supports our direct and partner sales motion across markets.
* **Make these stick.** Drive the change management, data migration, integrations, and adoption that turn "go-live" into "actually working," in close partnership with commercial and the infrastructure engineers in our tech team.


If implementing core platforms fast, and well, is the work you find most satisfying, this role is built for you.

**What you'll own ongoing**
---------------------------

**Strategy and platforms** Define and execute Nofence's business technology strategy and enterprise architecture. Act as product owner for our core platforms, managing roadmaps, partners, and delivery. Set pragmatic standards for interoperability and integration, and keep technical debt honest.

**Data and BI** Establish lightweight, fit-for-purpose data governance and quality standards with clear ownership. Build toward a trusted single source of truth and self-service analytics that people actually use.

**AI enablement** Make sure our systems, data, and infrastructure are ready to support AI tools across the company, working alongside the teams driving adoption. You enable it; you don't own the rollout.

**Security, risk and compliance** Own information security, privacy, and compliance. Run vendor assessments, keep us audit-ready, and maintain sensible business continuity and disaster recovery plans.

**Operations and reliability** Maintain secure, resilient, scalable infrastructure and end-user IT services (device lifecycle, provisioning, support) without letting them eat the strategic work.

**Vendors and spend** Own the partner and vendor landscape. Negotiate contracts, manage SLAs, and keep SaaS and cloud spend transparent and under control.

**Team and end-user IT** Decide how we best cover day-to-day end-user IT (laptops, access, phones) — whether that's a first hire reporting to you or an outsourced partner — and shape the IT organization from there as we grow.

**How this works with Product & Engineering**
---------------------------------------------


This role is about *business* technology: the internal systems, data, and infrastructure that power how Nofence runs.


Our Product & Engineering teams keep full ownership of customer-facing technology, development frameworks, and cloud architecture. You'll partner closely with them to ensure data flows cleanly and securely across the company, but you're not running product tech, and they're not running yours. Clear lines, close collaboration.

**What we're looking for**
--------------------------


The non-negotiables:

* **You have personally led an ERP and/or e-commerce implementation end to end**, ideally on a tight timeline, and you can talk in detail about what went right and what you'd never do again.
* **You're a doer who rallies people.** You set a goal, get the right people moving, and make stuff happen. We're hiring for execution, not for presentations. If your strength is talking about the work rather than shipping it, this isn't the role.


Beyond that:

* 7+ years in IT / business technology leadership, ideally in a fast-growing international scale-up
* A genuine player-coach who's comfortable being hands-on with a small team, not just directing one
* Strong grounding in enterprise systems and integrations (ERP, CRM, e-commerce, process automation)
* Solid command of IT security, privacy, and compliance, applied pragmatically rather than bureaucratically
* Experience owning an IT budget and managing vendors and SaaS/cloud spend
* Excellent communication and the ability to align stakeholders at every level
* Fluent in English (Norwegian or Swedish is a plus)

**Why join Nofence**
--------------------


You'll get end-to-end ownership of business technology at a mission-driven company that's genuinely changing how livestock is managed. You'll make foundational decisions, see them go live quickly, and watch them make the whole company faster. If you like strategic influence *and* getting your hands dirty, you'll feel at home here.

**Apply**
---------


Apply through Teamtailor and tell us about an implementation you're proud of, what you owned, and how fast you got it live.

title: Backend Engineer
description:
Lyten is leading an industrial revolution through Lyten 3D Graphene™, a breakthrough supermaterial unlocking a new generation of products — from lithium–sulfur batteries and energy storage systems to concrete admixtures, lightweight composites, and next-generation sensors that are revolutionizing industries. Together, these innovations are making a massive global improvement and driving real-world impact across energy, mobility, construction, and defense.
   

  

 At Lyten, we believe the most meaningful careers begin with purpose — and with people who want to make a difference. We’re not just developing advanced supermaterials — we’re about to change the world as we know it, reshaping how energy is stored, how products are built, and how progress is made.
   

  

 We’re entering an exciting growth phase, scaling production across the U.S. and Europe and expanding our team of engineers, scientists, and innovators.
   

  

 Apply now to join our team and be part of something bigger than yourself — where collaboration, creativity, and purpose come together to build the technologies that will define the next century.
   

  

 Lyten Poland is currently seeking a Backend Engineer to support the development of our Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) cloud platform. In this role, you will be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining scalable backend services and cloud infrastructure that connect our battery systems to the cloud.
   

  

 This position combines hands-on backend engineering with cloud infrastructure development. You will play a key role in enabling reliable data ingestion, processing, and analytics for IoT-enabled energy storage solutions, working closely with cross-functional teams in a fast-paced and innovative environment.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design, implement, and maintain scalable backend services supporting ESS cloud platform
* Develop and manage AWS cloud infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (Terraform)
* Build and optimize data pipelines for IoT telemetry ingestion, streaming, and storage (e.g., Kinesis, S3, Lambda)
* Ensure high availability, reliability, and performance of distributed cloud systems
* Collaborate with Embedded, TechOps, and Data teams to integrate edge devices with cloud and data platforms
* Deploy, configure, and maintain Databricks workspaces, clusters, and data processing jobs
* Implement CI/CD pipelines and automation for infrastructure and backend services
* Apply cloud security best practices, including IAM, VPC design, encryption, and audit logging
* Monitor system performance, troubleshoot production issues, and optimize system efficiency
* Contribute to architecture decisions and continuously improve platform scalability and cost-efficiency


**What You Bring**
* Educational background and previous experience required for the role.
* ≥ 3 years with Terraform (modules, workspaces, CI/CD integration).
* Extensive experience building distributed cloud platforms.
* Proficiency in Python, Bash, and Go for automation and tooling.
* Familiarity with Spark workloads and cluster provisioning, in addition to working with SQL/ETL/ELT workflows
* Experience with GitLab/GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or similar pipelines.
* A degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering (B.Sc. or M.Sc.), or another related field.


**Specific Skills**
* Deep hands‑on experience with core AWS services (EC2, VPC, RDS, S3, IAM, Lambda, Kinesis).
* Proven work on ingesting and processing device telemetry at scale.
* Understanding of cloud security best practices (least privilege, encryption, audit logging).
* Ability to work cross‑functionally with Embedded firmware engineers, TechOps teams, and Data scientists/engineers.
* Excellent English skills, both written and spoken


**Why Work at Lyten**
 At Lyten, you’ll be part of a team that’s redefining what’s possible in energy, materials, and manufacturing. We’re not just imagining the future — we’re building it today with breakthrough technologies that are changing how products are made and how industries innovate.
   

  

 Our people are the heart of that mission. From world-class scientists and engineers to creative problem-solvers in operations, manufacturing, and commercialization, every member of the Lyten team plays a role in turning bold ideas into real-world impact. We believe that the best work happens when you’re doing great things in the world — with people you like. Collaboration, curiosity, and a shared sense of purpose drive everything we do.
   

  

 What You’ll Find at Lyten
   

  

* A mission that matters: Contribute directly to solving complex challenges in energy, mobility, and materials innovation.
* Cutting-edge innovation: Work on technologies at the intersection of materials science, energy storage, and advanced manufacturing that strengthen energy security and local supply chains.
* Extraordinary people: Join a team of talented, friendly, and down-to-earth innovators who support, challenge, and inspire one another every day.
* Teamwork and culture: Experience a workplace built on trust, respect, and shared success — where collaboration fuels breakthroughs and everyone’s ideas are heard.
* Global impact: Help scale new materials and energy solutions that reinforce industrial resilience across the U.S. and Europe.
* Career growth: Be part of a fast-moving company entering a commercial growth phase, with opportunities to lead, learn, and make your mark.
* Purpose-driven values: Thrive in an environment that celebrates ingenuity, optimism, and meaningful progress — together.


 Lyten offers the opportunity to do the most important work of your career — helping build the technologies that will power the next century of innovation.
   

  

 Join us, and help transform industries, communities, and the planet with friends who share your drive to make a difference.

title: Platform Engineer
description:
**Vill du vara med och bygga en modern, container- och tooling-plattform som Sveriges betalflöden är beroende av – varje dag, i alla lägen?**
 På Bankgirot har vi gjort ett aktivt val: att ta ansvar för något större än oss själva. Sedan 1959 har vi stått för den tekniska strukturen som binder samman Sveriges banker och ser till att betalningar fungerar tryggt och stabilt. Samtidigt befinner vi oss i en av de största teknikförflyttningarna i modern tid.
   

  

 Nu etablerar vi en ny, växande platform engineering-förmåga och söker två Platform Engineers, en medior och en senior, som vill vara med och forma framtiden.
   

  

**Hos oss får du**
* Vara med och bygga en modern, open source-baserad plattform som är avgörande för Sveriges betalflöden
* Arbeta i gränslandet mellan infrastruktur, utveckling, säkerhet med cloud native-teknik
* Påverka arbetssätt, teknikval och arkitektur i en plattform ständigt under uppbyggnad
* Vara en del av en samhällsviktig verksamhet med höga krav på tillgänglighet, stabilitet och säkerhet


**Om rollen**
 Som Platform Engineer blir du en del av vårt nystartade team
 **Cloud, Container, Platform & Tooling** 
 . Du kliver in i en produktionssatt plattform som snabbt har gått från idé till verklighet, och som nu utvecklas vidare mot en mer mogen, robust och lättanvänd lösning där vi själva äger, driftar och vidareutvecklar komponenterna.
   

  

 Du kommer att få arbeta i en modern teknikmiljö som inkluderar bland annat en containerplattform baserat på vanilla kubernetes omgiven av en service mesh, samt tooling bestående av GitLab, ArgoCD och Jfrog Artifactory & Xray.
   

  

**I rollen ingår att**
* Designa, drifta och vidareutveckla containerplattformen, både on‑prem och i cloud
* Automatisera plattforms- och driftprocesser samt vidareutveckla CI/CD- och GitOps‑flöden
* Arbeta med verktyg som GitLab, ArgoCD och Ansible
* Samarbeta med användare kring onboarding, stöd och kontinuerlig förbättring av plattformen
* Samarbeta med säkerhets- och driftorganisationen för att säkerställa krav på tillgänglighet, prestanda och säkerhet
* Arbeta proaktivt med robusthet, observability, säkerhet och incidenthantering


**Vi vill att du**
 Är T-formad med solid grund inom Linux och har vidareutvecklat din kompetens inom någon del av den moderna cloud native-världen. Oavsett om din spets ligger inom Kubernetes, CI/CD tooling, automation, observability eller säkerhet har du en naturlig nyfikenhet och vilja att fortsätta utvecklas.
   

  

  

* Har erfarenhet av containerteknik och CI/CD tooling i produktionsmiljö, on-prem eller cloud
* Vill ersätta varje manuellt flöde med automation
* Trivs i en dynamisk miljö under uppbyggnad och vill aktivt bidra till arkitektur, teknikval och plattformsutveckling, med ett pragmatiskt förhållningssätt och stark samarbetsförmåga


**Så arbetar vi tillsammans**
 Hos oss arbetar vi gärna tillsammans på kontoret – det stärker samarbete, lärande och vår gemensamma kultur. Här finns goda möjligheter att utvecklas i yrkesrollen och ta nästa steg över tid. Vi erbjuder också förmåner som gör skillnad i vardagen, som eget gym, generöst friskvårdsbidrag, cykelförmån samt trygga pensions- och försäkringslösningar.
   

  

**Säkerhetsprövning**
 För rollen genomförs säkerhetsprövning innan anställning i enlighet med säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) – en naturlig del av ansvaret att värna tryggheten i Sveriges betalsystem.
   

  

**Anställningsform**
 Tillsvidare
   

  

**Övrigt**
 Du behöver ha goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.
   

  

**Tillträde**
 Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

**Ansökan**
 Vill du vara med och skapa framdrift? Då kan detta vara rollen för dig. Urval sker löpande.
   

  

 I den här rekryteringen samarbetar vi med Nexer Recruit. Har du frågor eller funderingar? Kontakta gärna rekryteringskonsult Johanna Värmfors:
 **johanna.varmfors@nexergroup.com** 
 eller +46 730 821 230 alternativt Jenny Nilsson:
 **jenny.nilsson@nexergroup.com** 
 eller +46 703 018 279.
   

  

**Om Bankgirot**
 Sedan starten 1959 har Bankgirot stått för den tekniska strukturen som binder samman Sveriges banker i det nationella betalsystemet. Företagets historia präglas av innovation, engagemang och stolthet över sitt samhällsviktiga uppdrag. Genom expertkunskap och en stark kultur arbetar man varje dag för att säkerställa att varje transaktion sker sömlöst och effektivt.
   

  

 Tillsammans med kunder och samarbetspartners skapas långsiktigt värde för marknaden och samhället. Som en förenande kraft formar Bankgirot en modern och framtidssäkrad svensk betalinfrastruktur. Bankgirot förenar, förvaltar och förnyar betalsverige. Läs mer på www.bankgirot.se
   

  

 Bankgirot är ett svenskt clearinghus och teknikbolag med över 60 års erfarenhet av att leverera finansiell infrastruktur till banker. I samverkan med betalsektorn ser vi till att privatpersoner och företag enkelt kan göra överföringar och betalningar. Bankgirot säkerställer att det nuvarande betalsystemet fungerar felfritt, samtidigt som vi utvecklar framtidssäkrade lösningar. Vi säkrar och utvecklar Sveriges betalningar.
   

  

 Läs mer på www.bankgirot.se

title: Tech Lead
description:
*Want to influence the bigger picture? At Saab, you can realise amazing innovations that keep people and societies safe. Together, we can truly make an impact – and your part matters.*
 Common Tech is the engine behind Saab’s technological transformation—building the shared platforms, capabilities, and foundations that enable the entire organization to scale, innovate, and deliver at speed.
   

  

 Within this ecosystem, Product Tech plays a unique role—bridging the gap between technology and real-world impact. It ensures that the capabilities built in Common Tech are not just available—but adopted, integrated, and used where it matters most: in real products, by real teams. A particular focus lies on AI-based solutions that will be integrated into Saab's product portfolio and used broadly across the organization. What you help create in Product Tech has direct impact across multiple products, teams and business areas. Product Tech is where Saab’s future technology is shaped—and where it is brought into real use across the whole organization.
   

  

**Your role**
 We are now looking for a Tech Lead to join Product Tech at Saab. You will play a key role in both strategic important digitalization initiatives and Forward Deployed engagements, helping accelerate innovation and enable real impact across the organization.
   

  

 This role sits at the heart of Saab’s digital strategy execution model, where different types of engagements come together:
   

  

* Strategic, business-critical initiatives focused on developing new solutions and pushing the boundaries of current capabilities
* High-impact efforts where you enable teams adopt and implement modern technologies, platforms, and ways of working in real product environments


 As a Tech Lead you will operate across both—building new capabilities while also ensuring they are successfully deployed, adopted, and used in practice. You combine hands-on development, technical leadership and delivery responsibility.
   

  

**What you will do:**
 Hands-on engineering:
   

  

* Design, build, and integrate solutions within cloud, data, and AI
* Work with modular architecture, design and reusable building blocks and common components - It’s about building robust, reusable, and future-proof solutions that others can rely on.
* Contribute to both new development and real-world implementation (Forward Deployment)


 Drive delivery:
   

  

* Take end-to-end ownership of team deliveries
* Remove obstacles and accelerate progress
* Manage risks, dependencies, and escalations
* Ensure value is delivered in complex environments


 Provide technical direction:
   

  

* Set and guide the technical direction of the team
* Ensure alignment with modern principles (modular, cloud-first, AI-enabled)
* Balance rapid delivery with long-term architectural integrity


 Enable adoption and transformation:
   

  

* Work directly with Business Unit teams to deploy and operationalize solutions in real environments
* Support onboarding, workshops, and hands-on collaboration (e.g., pair/mob programming)
* Ensure knowledge transfer—so teams can own, use, and scale solutions independently


**Your profile**
 We believe you thrive in environments where:
   

  

* You alternate between building new solutions and enabling others to use them
* Requirements evolve, and impact matters more than perfection
* You work close to real users and real products


 You bring:
   

  

* Strong software engineering experience (cloud, CI/CD, modular architecture; experience in data/AI)
* Proven ability to lead technically while staying hands-on
* Experience working in complex systems or product environments
* A solution-oriented mindset and ability to navigate ambiguity
* Enable teams to move forward when things are unclear or challenging
* Strong communication skills and a collaborative, coaching approach
* The ability to bring structure, clarity, and direction where none exists, especially in complex and fast-moving environments


 Experience:
   

  

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field, or equivalent work experience
* Several years of experience in software engineering/development, preferably within complex systems or product environments
* Proven experience working with cloud-based solutions, CI/CD pipelines, and modern software development practices, system design and architecture, preferably in modular or distributed systems
* Experience and/or understanding of how AI and data can be applied to create real-world value in products, beyond experimentation or prototyping


 Technical competence:
   

  

* Strong capability to design, build, and integrate solutions within cloud, data, and/or AI domains
* Experience working with modular architecture and reusable building blocks
* Ability to develop robust, scalable, and reusable solutions that can be leveraged across teams and products
* Understanding of how to design future-proof systems that support long-term evolution and reuse


*This position requires that you pass a security vetting based on the current regulations around/of security protection. For positions requiring security clearance additional obligations on citizenship may apply.*
**What You Will Be Part Of**
 Explore a wealth of possibilities. Take on challenges, create smart inventions, and grow beyond. This is a place for curious minds, brave pioneers, and everyone in between. Together, we achieve the extraordinary, each bringing our unique perspectives. Your part matters.
   

  

 Saab is a leading defense and security company with an enduring purpose, to help nations keep their people and society safe. Empowered by its 28,000 talented people, Saab constantly pushes the boundaries of technology to create a safer and more sustainable world.
   

  

 Saab designs, manufactures and maintains advanced systems in aeronautics, weapons, command and control, sensors and underwater systems. Saab is headquartered in Sweden. It has major operations all over the world and is part of the domestic defense capability of several nations. Read more about us here

title: Senior Cloud Architect & People Manager
description:
Att välja Capgemini innebär att välja en arbetsplats där du ges möjlighet att forma din karriär på det sätt du själv önskar, där du ingår i en stödjande och inspirerande gemenskap med engagerade kollegor världen över, och där du får chansen att omdefiniera vad som är möjligt. Våra Cloud & Custom Applications team fokuserar på att utveckla skräddarsydda, skalbara och säkra cloudapplikationer, integrera IT-system och driva affärstransformation. AI är en nyckelteknologi i allt vi gör och en central del i hur vi formar och bygger moderna system och lösningar, där intelligenta AI-drivna arbetssätt och teknologier som Agentic AI driver utvecklingen framåt. Bli en del av oss och var med och forma framtidens system tillsammans med världsledande organisationer och bidra till att frigöra teknikens fulla potential i en mer hållbar och inkluderande värld!
   

  

****Om rollen****
 Vill du förändra världen? Vi söker en Senior Cloud Architect & People Manager för AWS och/eller GCP, som kommer vara en nyckelperson i att utföra molntransformationer inom AWS / GCP, driva strategiska initiativ på nordisk nivå, vara rådgivare åt CXOs, och bygga högpresterande team. Du kommer ha möjlighet att delta i molnkonferenser, bidra till pre-sales och bygga nätverk med partners som Amazon, Microsoft och Google.
   

  

 I rollen kommer du behöva stödja kunder med molnarkitektur, kunna stödja team i att utföra implementationer av din vision, och successivt ta större ledaransvar för ett växande team. Du kommer ha ansvar som people manager där du kommer vara chef, ha personalansvar, ansvara för rekryteringsmål, och stödja kollegor.
   

  

*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:*
* Driva strategi och initiativ inom cloud på nordisk nivå.
* Hjälpa våra kunder med molnarkitektur och cloud native lösningar.
* Använda dig utav generativ och agentisk AI.


*S* 
*om People Manager kommer du att:*
* Personalansvar för ett växande team.
* Ansvara för att sätta riktningen för teamets utveckling, driva affärsutveckling och bidra till tillväxt. Rekrytering och kompetensutveckling är en naturlig del av din vardag.
* Ha fokus på dina teammedlemmars individuella karriärutveckling. Genom regelbundna one-on-one-samtal hjälper du dina konsulter att planera sina karriärer och nå sina mål.
* Du kommer att arbeta nära försäljnings- och leveransteam, andra chefer för att säkerställa att vi levererar högsta värde till våra kunder.


**Din profil**
* Minst 6 års erfarenhet och mycket goda kunskaper av implementation med molntjänster som AWS eller GCP.
* Minst 3 år som molnarkitekt och ansvarig för att sätta upp molnarkitektur, gärna med kunskaper om Amazons tolkning utav CAF, WAF, COM och OCA.
* Kunskap i ett eller flera programmeringsspråk, t.ex. Python, Java, Kotlin, Golang eller Node.
* Intresse för DevSecOps, generativ AI, agentisk AI och cloud-native lösningar.
* En naturlig ledare som vill utveckla andra. Väldigt positivt om du har tidigare erfarenhet med personalansvar.
* Flytande svenska och engelska kunskaper, i både tal och skrift.


**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas**
* Arbeta med de senaste teknologierna och påverka på nordisk nivå. Du samarbetar med andra specialister, kompetensväxlar och bidrar till att bygga AWS-kapabilitet i Norden – samtidigt som du påverkar några av världens största bolag.
* Utvecklas genom utbildningar, certifieringar och interna initiativ- Du får tillgång till utbildningar och certifieringar inom AI och AWS samt möjlighet att engagera dig i Capgeminis fokusområden som Diversity & Inclusion, Sustainability, Wellness Club och Art Club.
* Njut av en engagerande arbetsplats med starkt stöd och förmåner. Vi erbjuder friskvårdsbidrag, tjänstepension, bonusprogram, företagshälsovård och sjukvårdsförsäkring – samt en inkluderande kontorskultur med sociala aktiviteter och teambuilding.


**Ansökan**
 Redo att ta din karriär till nästa nivå? Ansök nu och bli en del av Capgemini Sveriges innovativa AWS-team! Ansök redan idag – vi hanterar ansökningarna löpande. Under processen får du chansen att kika in på vårt kontor, prata med vår rekryterande chef och självklart ställa alla dina nyfikna frågor till vår rekryterare. Varmt välkommen in med din ansökan!
   

  

*Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov.*
**Om Capgemini**
 Capgemini är en AI-driven global partner för affärs- och tekniktransformation som levererar konkret verksamhetsnytta. Vi formar framtiden för organisationer och förverkligar den med hjälp av AI, teknik och människor. Med vår starka historia på nästan 60 år är vi en ansvarsfull och mångsidig koncern med över 420 000 medarbetare i över 50 länder. Genom vår expertis inom strategi, teknik, design, ingenjörstjänster och affärsverksamhet levererar vi heltäckande tjänster och lösningar, baserade på vår djupa branschkunskap och vårt omfattande partnernätverk. Koncernen rapporterade globala intäkter på 22,5 miljarder euro för 2025.
   

  

**Make it real** 
 | www.capgemini.com

title: Data Engineer
description:
**VVi söker Data Engineers**
 Vi rekryterar inte till en specifik roll, utan söker ständigt efter nya duktiga kollegor med en positiv inställning och en vilja att lära och dela med sig av sina kunskaper. Med den inställningen vet vi att du kan lyckas som konsult hos ten10. Därför lyssnar vi på dig och ser, utifrån din erfarenhet och kompetens, vilken typ av spännande uppdrag där du trivs och utvecklas bäst.
   

  

 Hos ten10 blir du en del av en organisation som värdesätter den personliga relationen, där varje individ får vara med och påverka både sin egen och ten10s utveckling.
   

  

 Vi tror på att bygga ett bolag av olika personer som bidrar på olika sätt till att vi alla trivs och lyckas. Utöver att göra skillnad i de uppdrag vi gemensamt väljer utifrån ditt intresse och din utveckling är du en viktig del av ett framåtlutat bolag där våra medarbetare alltid står i fokus.
   

  

**Hos oss ser man…**
 …positivt på utmaningar
   

  

 …positivt på samarbete men klarar också av att vara självgående när det behövs
   

  

 …positivt på nya teknologier, data och komplexa problem
   

  

 …positivt på kompetensutveckling och att ständigt bli bättre
   

  

 …positivt på att vara med och påverka
   

  

**Att vara en konsult hos ten10**
 Vi vill ständigt bli bättre och kunna hjälpa fler av våra kunder i deras utmaningar. Vi därför söker vi nu fler Data Engineers som vill vara med på en spännande resa, tillsammans med oss och våra kunder.
   

  

 Som Data Engineer-konsult hos ten10 har du en nyckelroll i att demokratisera data ute hos våra kunder. Tillgänglig, tillförlitlig och välstrukturerad data är grunden för både Analytics, Machine Learning och AI-lösningar och där gör du verklig skillnad.
   

  

 Våra uppdrag varierar, men gemensamt är att du arbetar nära både verksamhet, analytiker, data scientists och utvecklingsteam för att skapa hållbara dataplattformar och datadrivna lösningar.
   

  

**I din roll som Data Engineer…**
* flytande i både Svenska och Engelska


 …har du vilja och intresse av att lösa kundernas problem och se det som en intressant utmaning.
   

  

 …har du minst tre års arbetslivserfarenhet inom rollen eller liknande roller
   

  

* har du gärna erfarenhet eller ett stort intresse av Databricks


 …är du skicklig i ett skriptspråk som Python.
   

  

 …gillar du att bygga pipelines med (med ApacheSpark, Flink eller liknande).
   

  

 …har du en djup förståelse för systemdesign, datastrukturer och algoritmer och kunskapen att tillämpa dem för att skapa pragmatiska lösningar.
   

  

 …har du erfarenhet av molnplattformar som AWS, Azure, GCP eller liknande.
   

  

 …har du erfarenhet av av big data-teknologier som Hadoop, Kafka, SQL, Spark m.m.
   

  

 …är du noggrann men också lösningsorienterad
   

  

 …trivs du att jobba i agila team och gärna också i en mer ledande roll.
   

  

 …har du ett stort intresse för Data och Analytics området i allmänhet
   

  

**Vad får man ut av att vara en ten10are**
 Hos ten10 är det viktigt att hitta en sund balans mellan privatliv och arbetsliv. Vi arbetar tillsammans för att hitta ett upplägg som fungerar i din vardag – både när det gäller uppdrag, arbetssätt och ersättning.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder en av marknadens mest attraktiva lönemodeller, där du får tydlig kompensation för det värde du skapar.
   

  

 Vi lägger också stor vikt vid gemenskap. Du får möjlighet att dela erfarenheter, idéer och perspektiv när vi ses på AWs, resor, julbord och andra gemensamma aktiviteter.
   

  

 Vi pratar inte bara om att vi bryr oss om våra medarbetare – hela vår verksamhet bygger på dem. Vår ambition är att skapa rätt förutsättningar för just dig.

title: AI Engineer/Architect – LLM, RAG & Applied AI
description:
We're building AI-native systems – and helping shape how AI transforms engineering, products and organisations.
   

  

 At Knowit Connectivity, AI is becoming a fundamental part of how modern systems are designed, developed and operated. We're looking for experienced engineers and architects who want to help clients move beyond experimentation and build production-grade AI solutions that create real business value.
   

  

 As we continue to invest in AI as a company, we're looking for people who want to combine deep technical expertise with a passion for shaping the future of AI-enabled engineering.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a senior consultant, you'll work across the full lifecycle of applied AI – from strategy and architecture to implementation, deployment and continuous improvement.
   

  

 You will help clients understand how AI changes products, workflows and technical systems while taking a leading role in designing solutions that are scalable, observable and trustworthy.
   

  

 In addition to client engagements, you will be part of Knowit Connectivity's AI Advisory Team. The team plays a central role in shaping our AI strategy, developing internal capabilities, evaluating emerging technologies and helping drive our AI initiatives forward.
   

  

 This means your role is divided between delivering value in client assignments and helping strengthen Knowit's AI capabilities internally. You'll collaborate with other senior AI specialists, architects and business leaders to identify opportunities, establish best practices and continuously evolve how we apply AI across the organisation.
   

  

 Typical work includes:
   

  

* Designing AI-native architectures and intelligent systems
* Building and deploying LLM-based applications in production
* Implementing RAG solutions across large and complex information landscapes
* Designing agent-based workflows and autonomous system behaviours
* Defining governance, observability and evaluation strategies for AI systems
* Integrating AI capabilities into existing products, platforms and business processes
* Evaluating trade-offs around performance, reliability, cost and control
* Supporting clients in their AI transformation journey
* Contributing to the development of Knowit's AI strategy and AI offerings


 What we're looking for
   

  

 We're primarily looking for senior profiles with hands-on experience in applied AI.
   

  

 You likely have experience with several of the following:
   

  

* Building applications using LLMs
* Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and vector databases
* Agent frameworks and orchestration platforms
* System architecture and distributed systems
* Python or similar programming languages
* Cloud platforms such as Azure, AWS or GCP
* Evaluation, monitoring and optimisation of AI systems
* Data engineering and integration of complex information sources


 Experience with enterprise architecture, platform engineering or large-scale software development is highly valuable.
   

  

 Who you are
   

  

 You understand that AI is changing software engineering and system design fundamentally.
   

  

 You enjoy working across strategy, architecture and implementation, and you're comfortable helping clients navigate both technical and organisational challenges related to AI adoption.
   

  

 You are curious, pragmatic and continuously learning as the AI landscape evolves.
   

  

 You don't need to fit a perfect profile – we value different strengths, whether you lean more towards architecture, platform engineering or implementation.
   

  

 Why join us
   

  

 At Knowit, you'll be part of a team that helps organisations move forward in their AI journey – from early exploration to real, implemented solutions.
   

  

 We work closely with our clients to understand their needs, identify opportunities and turn ideas into practical applications. Whether it's defining strategy, designing architectures or building production-ready systems, you'll play a key role in helping others succeed with AI.
   

  

 What you can expect:
   

  

* Working hands-on with clients to solve real business problems using AI
* Supporting organisations at different stages of their AI maturity
* Collaborating in a strong engineering culture where knowledge sharing is part of everyday work
* Opportunities to influence both client solutions and how we grow our AI capabilities internally
* A variety of projects and industries, giving you both breadth and depth over time
* A formal development roadmap where continuous AI learning and capability building are integrated parts of your professional growth


 We're building our AI capabilities together with our clients, which means your work will have a direct impact – not only on what we do, but on how others succeed in applying AI.
   

  

 Interested?
   

  

 If you've already built something real with LLMs and want to help shape how AI transforms engineering, products and organisations, we'd like to hear from you.

title: Security Engineer
description:
*Vi på Bankgirot har valt att ta ansvar för något större än oss själva: att forma framtidens betalsystem i Sverige. Sedan 1959 har våra lösningar haft en betydande påverkan på miljoner människors liv varje dag. Nu genomgår vi en omfattande transformation där vi bygger upp framtidens säkerhetsförmåga och söker Security Engineers som vill vara med och stärka skyddet kring Sveriges mest samhällskritiska betalningsinfrastruktur.*
**Om rollerna**
 Som Security Engineer på Bankgirot kommer du arbeta hands-on med förvaltning och vidareutveckling av säkerhetstjänster i en tekniskt komplex och verksamhetskritisk miljö. Rollen innebär nära samarbete med andra specialistfunktioner för att säkerställa stabila och framtidssäkrade lösningar.
   

  

 Nu söker vi profiler inom tre olika säkerhetsområden, där alla har en viktig funktion i att bygga upp och vidareutveckla Bankgirots säkerhetsplattformar och arbetssätt. Den ena rollen är fokuserad inom FortiSIEM och Splunk, den andra arbetar med EDR/NDR, och den tredje rollen ansvarar för PKI/HSM.
   

  

 I alla roller finns stora möjligheter att utvecklas inom automation, integrationer och nya arbetssätt i takt med att organisationen och tjänsterna fortsätter att byggas upp och utvecklas.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet av drift, förvaltning eller utveckling av säkerhetslösningar och som trivs i miljöer där systemen är komplexa och affärskritiska. Du är tekniskt nyfiken, lösningsorienterad och tycker om att förstå hur lösningar fungerar på djupet snarare än att enbart använda dem via gränssnitt.
   

  

 Du kan ha din styrka inom SIEM-plattformar och logghantering där du arbetat hands-on med Splunk eller FortiSIEM, inom EDR-lösningar, sårbarhetshantering och felsökning i komplexa Windows- och Linuxmiljöer, eller inom PKI/HSM med certifikathantering.
   

  

 Oavsett inriktning ser vi att du har ett starkt säkerhetstänk, förståelse för drift i komplexa miljöer och ett intresse för automation och förbättringsarbete.
   

  

**För rollen som Security Engineer FortiSIEM/Splunk tror vi att du har:**
* Erfarenhet av arbete med Splunk Enterprise och/eller FortiSIEM
* Erfarenhet av drift, patchning och felsökning i komplexa miljöer
* Förståelse för logghantering, SIEM-arkitektur och säkerhetsanalys
* Erfarenhet av Linux, nätverk och infrastruktur-relaterad felsökning


**För rollen som Security Engineer EDR/NDR tror vi att du har:**
* Erfarenhet av EDR-lösningar såsom SentinelOne eller motsvarande lösningar
* Erfarenhet av felsökning i Windows- och Linuxmiljöer
* Förståelse för incidentrespons, sårbarhetshantering och patchning
* Erfarenhet av NDR-lösningar såsom Vectra, eller intresse för att utvecklas inom området


**För rollen som Security Engineer PKI/HSM tror vi att du har:**
* Erfarenhet av PKI-koncept och certifikathantering
* Erfarenhet av EJBCA eller liknande certifikathanteringslösningar
* Erfarenhet av HSM eller liknande krypteringslösningar
* Erfarenhet av drift, patchning och livscykelhantering av on-prem-säkerhetslösningar


 För samtliga roller ser vi det som meriterande med erfarenhet från reglerad verksamhet såsom bank, försäkring eller myndighet.
   

  

**Så arbetar vi tillsammans:** 
 Hos oss arbetar vi gärna tillsammans på kontoret – det stärker samarbete, lärande och vår gemensamma kultur. Här finns goda möjligheter att utvecklas i yrkesrollen och ta nästa steg över tid. Vi erbjuder också förmåner som gör skillnad i vardagen, som eget gym, generöst friskvårdsbidrag, cykelförmån samt trygga pensions- och försäkringslösningar.
   

  

**Säkerhetsprövning:** 
 För den här rollen genomförs säkerhetsprövning innan anställning i enlighet med Säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) - en naturlig del av vårt ansvar att tillsammans värna tryggheten i Sveriges betalsystem.
   

  

**Anställningsform:** 
 Tillsvidare
   

  

**Övrigt:** 
 Du behöver ha goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.
   

  

**Tillträde:** 
 Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

**Vill du vara med och skapa framdrift? Då kan du bli en av oss!**
 I den här rekryteringen samarbetar Bankgirot med Ants Tech Recruiters. Kontakta Ellika Ulltin på ellika.ulltin@ants.se för mer information om rollen. Urval sker löpande - välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

**Om Bankgirot**
 Sedan starten 1959 har vi stått för den tekniska strukturen som binder samman Sveriges banker i vårt nationella betalsystem. Vår historia är rik på innovation, engagemang, och stolthet över vårt samhällsviktiga uppdrag. Genom vår expertkunskap och vår starka kultur, Bankgiroandan, arbetar vi varje dag för att säkerställa att varje transaktion sker sömlöst och effektivt.
   

  

 Tillsammans med våra kunder och samarbetspartners skapar vi resultat och långsiktigt värde som gynnar marknaden, samhället och Bankgirot. Som en förenande kraft gör vi det möjligt att forma en moderniserad och framtidssäkrad svensk betalinfrastruktur. Vi förenar, förvaltar och förnyar betalsverige! Läs mer på www.bankgirot.se
   

  

 Bankgirot är ett svenskt clearinghus och teknikbolag med över 60 års erfarenhet av att leverera finansiell infrastruktur till banker. I samverkan med betalsektorn ser vi till att privatpersoner och företag enkelt kan göra överföringar och betalningar. Bankgirot säkerställer att det nuvarande betalsystemet fungerar felfritt, samtidigt som vi utvecklar framtidssäkrade lösningar. Vi säkrar och utvecklar Sveriges betalningar.
   

  

 Läs mer på www.bankgirot.se

title: HSO International - Engagement Manager - Business Applications
description:
**Position:** 
 Engagement Manager - Business Applications (regular travel required)
   

  

**Department:** 
 Sales & Marketing
   

  

**Visa Sponsorship:** 
 You must have legal working rights in the country of your residence within the EMEA region. Sponsorship is only available within the Netherlands.
   

  

**What is your goal?**
 As an
 **International Engagement Manager** 
 , you will drive new business development across Europe by leveraging customer insights, market trends, and the power of
 **Microsoft Business Applications** 
 , including
 **Dynamics 365, Power Platform, and related cloud services** 
 . You will help clients transform their operations through innovative solutions in
 **Customer Engagement, Field Service, Finance, and Supply Chain** 
 .
   

  

**Leading Microsoft Partner**
 HSO belongs to the elite Microsoft Dynamics Inner Circle for 21 years, within the top 1% of all Microsoft partners worldwide. With over 2,800 professionals, and a worldwide presence, we deliver successful implementations across industries globally.
   

  

**HSO International**
 At HSO International, you’ll join a diverse team of 300+ colleagues from 50+ nationalities, working on cross-border projects that make a global impact.
   

  

 Learn more about Life at HSO International: https://www.hso.com/en/campaigns/life-at-hso-international/
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Qualify leads and manage the full sales cycle - from initial contact to signed agreement - within a marketing-driven business development framework.
* Advise clients, present tailored solutions, craft proposals, negotiate terms, and ensure follow-through on commitments.
* Stay current on Microsoft Business Applications, licensing models, and HSO’s service and support offerings.
* Focus on new business acquisition and customer development, particularly around Dynamics 365 and Power Platform.
* Travel approximately 5 days per month across Europe to meet with clients and prospects.


**You Bring**
* Experience in consultative sales - locally or regionally - and are ready to expand your impact on a global scale.
* A strong interest in Microsoft Business Applications and their potential to drive business transformation.
* Analytical thinking, a self-starting attitude, and a collaborative mindset.
* Ability to engage with senior stakeholders (CCO, CEO, COO, CMO, Digital Directors).
* A desire to be challenged and coached, not directed.


**Your have**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in business, technology, or a related field.
* Proven track record in new business development, ideally within Microsoft, SAP, or Salesforce ecosystems.
* Familiarity with CRM, Field Service, Finance, Supply Chain, and digital transformation topics.
* Fluent in English (spoken and written); additional languages are a plus.
* The ideal candidate for this role will be based in Denmark, Sweden or Finland. They are a citizen of an EU country and hold full EU working rights.


**Why should you choose HSO International?**
**Development and growth**
 You get a job with plenty of career opportunities with a leading provider of innovative enterprise business solutions and distinct Microsoft Global Solution Integrator, who perceives your motivations, talents and ambitions.
   

  

**Fun and success**
 You work in a collaborative and professional environment where success is built on teamwork and with colleagues who are ready to help each other.
   

  

**International project exposure**
 Joining our team offers an exciting opportunity to engage in international projects, providing invaluable exposure to diverse cultures, markets, and perspectives. Through your involvement in these projects, you will broaden your global network, enhance your cross-cultural communication skills, and gain firsthand experience in navigating the complexities of international collaboration.
   

  

**Freedom and responsibility**
 You have the freedom and flexibility to organize your workdays, but especially to shape your own career.
   

  

**Take the next step!**
 Does the combination of business processes and Microsoft technology appeal to you? Take the next step in your career path with HSO International!

title: Agentic AI Solution Specialist (Cloud & Custom Applications)
description:
Att välja Capgemini innebär att välja en arbetsplats där du ges möjlighet att forma din karriär på det sätt du själv önskar, där du ingår i en stödjande och inspirerande gemenskap med engagerade kollegor världen över, och där du får chansen att omdefiniera vad som är möjligt. Våra Cloud & Custom Applications team fokuserar på att utveckla skräddarsydda, skalbara och säkra cloudapplikationer, integrera IT-system och driva affärstransformation. AI är en nyckelteknologi i allt vi gör och en central del i hur vi formar och bygger moderna system och lösningar, där intelligenta AI-drivna arbetssätt och teknologier som Agentic AI driver utvecklingen framåt. Bli en del av oss och var med och forma framtidens system tillsammans med världsledande organisationer och bidra till att frigöra teknikens fulla potential i en mer hållbar och inkluderande värld!
   

  

**Din roll**
 Som Agentic AI Solution Specialist blir du en drivande kraft i att forma framtidens intelligenta automation. Du kommer att arbeta nära våra kunder för att identifiera affärsmöjligheter och omsätta dem till robusta, agentbaserade AI-lösningar. Rollen är konsultativ och kombinerar tekniskt djup med affärsmässighet – du är både rådgivare och inspiratör. Utöver arbetet med kunder blir också en viktig del av vårt interna kompetensnätverk genom kunskapsdelning, pre-sales och strategiska initiativ. Eftersom rollen är ny får du stor frihet att påverka dess utveckling och forma vägarna framåt för att skapa verkligt värde för Capgemini och våra kunder.
   

  

*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:*
* Driva kundprojekt inom Agentic AI och intelligent automation från idé till leverans.
* Agera senior advisor i strategiska initiativ och projekt som rör Agentic AI, och bidra med expertstöd i komplexa frågor.
* Utveckla och presentera go-to-market-förslag samt delta i pre-salesaktiviteter.
* Bygga och dela kunskap internt genom Capgeminis Guilds och Centers of Excellences, samt kombinera teknisk expertis med affärsdrivande och kommunikativa insatser för att inspirera och sälja in lösningar.


**Din profil**
* Dokumenterad kompetens inom Agentic AI och erfarenhet av att omsätta komplex teknik till affärsvärde.
* Djup teknisk expertis kombinerad med affärsmässighet och en konsultativ, kommunikativ och pedagogisk approach – du kan förklara teknik på ett sätt som skapar förståelse och engagemang.
* Förståelse för att förändringsinitiativ handlar om människor lika mycket som teknik – du skapar engagemang och säkerställer adoption av nya lösningar.
* Flytande kunskaper i engelska och svenska i tal och skrift


**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas**
* Möjligheten att forma en pionjärroll med stor frihet och påverkan på dess utformning – du blir en nyckelperson i att driva intelligent automation och Agentic AI hos våra kunder och internt.
* Tillgång till den senaste tekniken och plattformar som Microsoft Copilot, Azure AI foundry, UiPath Agentic och Google Cloud, samt ett globalt nätverk av experter.
* En kultur som uppmuntrar innovation, kompetensutveckling och kunskapsdelning, där du får utrymme att leda förändring och skapa verklig impact.


**Ansökan**
*Efter att du skickat in din ansökan gör vi en första urvalsbedömning. Därefter följer en telefonintervju med ansvarig Talent Acquisition Partner, en intervju med rekryterande chef på kontoret och en teknisk intervju där vi går djupare in på din kompetens. Som avslutning genomför vi relevanta tester och referenstagning innan vi går vidare till ett eventuellt erbjudande.*
*Vi värdesätter din tid och ser till att du får tydlig kommunikation och snabb återkoppling genom hela processen. Du kommer löpande kunna ställa frågor och få uppdateringar från ansvarig Talent Acquisition Partner – vårt mål är att skapa en positiv upplevelse där du får en rättvis bild av både rollen och oss som arbetsgivare.*
*Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov.*
**Om Capgemini**
 Capgemini är en AI-driven global partner för affärs- och tekniktransformation som levererar konkret verksamhetsnytta. Vi formar framtiden för organisationer och förverkligar den med hjälp av AI, teknik och människor. Med vår starka historia på nästan 60 år är vi en ansvarsfull och mångsidig koncern med över 420 000 medarbetare i över 50 länder. Genom vår expertis inom strategi, teknik, design, ingenjörstjänster och affärsverksamhet levererar vi heltäckande tjänster och lösningar, baserade på vår djupa branschkunskap och vårt omfattande partnernätverk. Koncernen rapporterade globala intäkter på 22,5 miljarder euro för 2025.
   

  

**Make it real** 
 | www.capgemini.com

title: Network & Security Engineer (telecom)
description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.
   

  

**Your role**
 As a Network and Security Engineer, you will support the design, implementation, and operation of secure network and cloud environments that enable reliable and high‑performance services across telecom and IT infrastructures. This includes working with 4G/5G technologies, hybrid cloud platforms, and modern distributed systems. You will contribute to secure connectivity, resilient network operations, and strong protection measures across domains such as RAN, Core, Cloud, Edge/MEC, and OSS/BSS, ensuring that both telecom and enterprise environments remain robust and secure.
   

  

*In this role you will play a key role in:*
* Integrate defense‑in‑depth, segmentation, encryption, and identity‑centric controls across telecom and cloud environments.
* Identify vulnerabilities and drive mitigation measures across network, infrastructure, and cloud platforms
* Support the secure integration of telecom vendor solutions and cloud‑native platforms such as Kubernetes and OpenStack.
* Produce high-quality architecture deliverables: HLDs, LLDs, security guidelines, and design standards.


**Your profile**
* Strong background in telecom security with hands‑on experience in 4G/5G, RAN/Core, and cloud‑native environments.
* Skilled in cloud & virtualization platforms (Kubernetes, OpenStack, Docker, VMware).
* Experienced with IAM, PKI, SIEM/SOAR, EDR/XDR, Zero Trust, and NGFW solutions (Fortinet FortiGate).
* Able to manage complex priorities with clear communication and structured decision‑making.
* Expertise in Trend Micro Vision One for large‑scale enterprise environments is required.


**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
* Flexible work setup that supports a healthy work life balance.
* Plenty of opportunities to learn, grow, and earn new certifications.
* A collaborative, inclusive team where your contribution truly matters.


**Your application**
 As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.
   

  

 Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

title: Data Engineer
description:
We are looking for a Data Engineer with hands-on experience integrating new data sources and designing, building, and maintaining data pipelines using DBT within modern data warehouse environments.
   

  

 The candidate should be a strong communicator and ideally have experience in smaller, fast-paced organizations where ownership is high, ambiguity is common, and initiative is valued. You are proactive in identifying solutions, navigating challenges, and finding answers without relying on direction or established processes.
   

  

**Start in** 
 August or September. Ideally second half of August to first half September.
   

  

**Duration:** 
 12 months
   

  

**Location:** 
 3 days on-site and 2 days remote
   

  

**Must have:**
* At least 5+ years of data engineering experience
* Ability to deliver projects autonomously and as part of a team
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills
* Strong in SQL and experience with cloud-based data platforms
* Knowledge of best practices in data warehousing and data modeling
* Experience building data pipelines in DBT (or similar frameworks)


**Nice to have skills/experiences:**
* Experience in finance or fintech industries
* Data Vault modeling
* Snowflake
* Cloud infrastructure
* CICD/devops
* Python
* Tableau (or similar visualization tools) + experience generating actionable insights and business value

title: M365 Security Engineer
description:
At Viaplay Group, we entertain millions of people every day through our streaming services, radio networks, and TV channels. We believe in the power of content not just as a way of telling stories and touching lives, but also expanding worlds.
   

  

 We’re looking for the best people to join us on our journey. Right now, we’re searching for a
 **M365 Security Engineer** 
 in our
 **Stockholm** 
 office – are you ready to hit play on an exciting career change?
   

  

**The Role**
 We are seeking an experienced M365 Security Engineer to join our IT Workplace team, working as a core team member with shared responsibility and close, hands‑on collaboration across all areas of IT. You will support security operations, governance, and compliance within an outsourced, Microsoft‑based hybrid IT environment.
   

  

 The role is responsible for protecting the organisation against cyber threats and embedding security best practices across the Group. You will work closely with colleagues and an outsourced IT partner to deliver effective and pragmatic security outcomes.
   

  

 You will act as a technical lead for security operations, incident response, and security tooling, working collaboratively rather than in isolation, and ensuring security is integrated into day‑to‑day IT operations and change initiatives.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Act as a security lead for IT modernisation and improvement initiatives
* Work with the SOC partner to monitor, investigate, and respond to security alerts and incidents across cloud, on‑premises, and SaaS environments
* Act as the technical escalation point for high‑priority security incidents, coordinating containment, remediation, and recovery activities
* Perform root cause analysis and post‑incident reviews, communicating risks and outcomes to both technical and non‑technical stakeholders.
* Administer and operate security tooling, primarily Microsoft Purview, Defender, and Entra
* Design and manage the implementation of Zero Trust controls utilising Conditional Access, PIM, RBAC, and identity governance
* Maintain and improve security policies, ensuring alignment with recognised standards and regulatory requirements such as ISO 27001 and NIS2
* Support vulnerability management activities, audits, penetration testing, and third‑party risk assessments
* Produce incident, threat, and compliance reporting for stakeholders
* Drive continuous improvement of security controls, tooling, and processes


**What We’re Looking For**
 We understand you may feel confident ticking certain boxes more than others and that’s why we always keep an open mind in our recruitment process. But, in order to thrive in this role, we do believe you’ll have at least some experience in the following:
   

  

* 5+ years’ experience in cybersecurity or security operations roles
* Hands‑on experience with Microsoft Purview, Defender, Entra, and vulnerability and threat management tools.
* Experience working with outsourced IT services and SOC partners
